papers.title: Insights from Rights and Wrongs: A Large Language Model for Solving Assertion Failures in RTL Design.
papers.abstract: SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) are essential for verifying Register Transfer Level (RTL) designs, as they can be embedded into key functional paths to detect unintended behaviours. During simulation, assertion failures occur when the design’s behaviour deviates from expectations. Solving these failures, i.e., identifying and fixing the issues causing the deviation, requires analysing complex logical and timing relationships between multiple signals. This process heavily relies on human expertise, and there is currently no automatic tool available to assist with it. Here, we present AssertSolver, an opensource Large Language Model (LLM) specifically designed for solving assertion failures. By leveraging synthetic training data and learning from error responses to challenging cases, AssertSolver achieves a bug-fixing pass@1 metric of $88.54 \%$ on our testbench, significantly outperforming OpenAI’s o1-preview by up to $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$. We release our model and testbench for public access to encourage further research: https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduce-AssertSolver-DAC-25.
papers.abstract_zh: SystemVerilog 断言 (SVA) 对于验证寄存器传输级 (RTL) 设计至关重要，因为它们可以嵌入到关键功能路径中以检测意外行为。在仿真过程中，当设计的行为偏离预期时，就会发生断言失败。解决这些故障，即识别并修复导致偏差的问题，需要分析多个信号之间复杂的逻辑和时序关系。这个过程在很大程度上依赖于人类的专业知识，目前没有可用的自动工具来协助它。在这里，我们介绍 AssertSolver，这是一种专为解决断言失败问题而设计的开源大型语言模型 (LLM)。通过利用合成训练数据并从对挑战性案例的错误响应中学习，AssertSolver 在我们的测试平台上实现了 88.54 \%$ 的错误修复 pass@1 指标，显着优于 OpenAI 的 o1-preview，高达 $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$。我们发布了我们的模型和测试平台以供公众访问，以鼓励进一步的研究：https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduct-AssertSolver-DAC-25。

papers.title: 3D-Carbon: An Analytical Carbon Modeling Tool for 3D and 2.5D Integrated Circuits.
4-Transistor Ternary Content Addressable Memory Cell Design using Stacked Hybrid IGZO/Si Transistors.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose a 4T-based paired orthogonally stacked transistors for random access memory (POST-RAM) cell structure and also suggest ternary content addressable memory (TCAM) applications. POST-RAM cells feature vertically stacked read and write transistors, maximizing area efficiency by utilizing only two transistors' space. POST-RAM employs InGaZnO (IGZO) channels for write transistors and single crystal silicon channels for read transistors, which results in both extremely long memory retention and fast reading performance. A comprehensive 3D-TCAD simulation is conducted to validate the procedural design of the proposed device structure. Furthermore, we introduced a self-clamped searching scheme (SC2S) designed to enhance the efficiency of TCAM operations. The results conclusively demonstrate that operating a TCAM based on the proposed POST-RAM architecture can lead to a 20% improvement in energy-delay product (EDP). Notably, the delay performance can be enhanced by up to 40% when compared to a 16T SRAM-based TCAM. Additionally, the proposed scheme enables a more than sixfold reduction in cell area, demonstrating an efficient use of space.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 4T 的成对正交堆叠晶体管，用于随机存取存储器 (POST-RAM) 单元结构，并提出了三态内容可寻址存储器 (TCAM) 应用。 POST-RAM 单元具有垂直堆叠的读取和写入晶体管，仅利用两个晶体管的空间即可最大限度地提高面积效率。 POST-RAM 采用 InGaZnO (IGZO) 通道作为写入晶体管，采用单晶硅通道作为读取晶体管，从而实现极长的内存保留和快速的读取性能。进行全面的 3D-TCAD 仿真以验证所提出的设备结构的程序设计。此外，我们引入了一种自钳位搜索方案（SC2S），旨在提高 TCAM 操作的效率。结果最终表明，基于所提出的 POST-RAM 架构运行 TCAM 可以使能量延迟积 (EDP) 提高 20%。值得注意的是，与基于 16T SRAM 的 TCAM 相比，延迟性能可提高高达 40%。此外，所提出的方案可以将单元面积减少六倍以上，展示了空间的有效利用。

papers.title: A Cache/Algorithm Co-design for Parallel Real-Time Systems with Data Dependency on Multi/Many-core System-on-Chips.
papers.abstract: Parallel real-time systems rely on a shared cache for dependent data transmission. A conventional shared cache suffers from intensive interference, yet existing cache management techniques only ensure determinism for single-threaded tasks. This paper introduces a virtual indexed, physically tagged, selectively-inclusive, non-exclusive L1.5 Cache, offering way-level control and fine-grained sharing capabilities. Focusing on DAG tasks, we construct a scheduling method that exploits the L1.5 Cache to reduce data transmission, hence, the makespan. As a systematical solution, we built a real system, from the SoC and the ISA to the programming model. Experiments show that our solution significantly improves the timing performance of DAG tasks with negligible overheads.
papers.abstract_zh: 并行实时系统依靠共享缓存来进行相关数据传输。传统的共享缓存受到强烈的干扰，而现有的缓存管理技术只能保证单线程任务的确定性。本文介绍了一种虚拟索引、物理标记、选择性包含、非独占的L1.5 Cache，提供路级控制和细粒度共享功能。针对DAG任务，我们构建了一种利用L1.5 Cache来减少数据传输的调度方法，从而减少了完工时间。作为一个系统化的解决方案，我们构建了一个真实的系统，从SoC、ISA到编程模型。实验表明，我们的解决方案显着提高了 DAG 任务的计时性能，而开销可以忽略不计。

papers.title: A Combined Content Addressable Memory and In-Memory Processing Approach for k-Clique Counting Acceleration.
papers.abstract: k-Clique counting problem plays an important role in graph mining which has seen a growing number of applications. However, current k-Clique counting accelerators cannot meet the performance requirement mainly because they struggle with high data transfer issue incurred by the intensive set intersection operations and the inability of load balancing. In this paper, we propose to solve this problem with a hybrid framework of content addressable memory (CAM) and in-memory processing (PIM). Specifically, we first utilize CAM for binary induced subgraph generation in order to reduce the search space, then we use PIM to implement in-place parallel k-Clique counting through iterative Boolean logic "AND" like operation. To take full advantage of this combined CAM and PIM framework, we develop dynamic task scheduling strategies that can achieve near optimal load balancing among the PIM arrays. Experimental results demonstrate that, compared with state-of-the-art CPU and GPU platforms, our approach achieves speedups of 167.5× and 28.8×, respectively. Meanwhile, the energy efficiency is improved by 788.3× over the GPU baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: k-Clique 计数问题在图挖掘中发挥着重要作用，其应用越来越多。然而，当前的k-Clique计数加速器无法满足性能要求，主要是因为它们面临着密集的集合交集操作所带来的高数据传输问题以及无法进行负载平衡。在本文中，我们建议通过内容可寻址存储器（CAM）和内存处理（PIM）的混合框架来解决这个问题。具体来说，我们首先利用 CAM 进行二进制诱导子图生成，以减少搜索空间，然后使用 PIM 通过迭代布尔逻辑“AND”之类的操作来实现就地并行 k-Clique 计数。为了充分利用这种组合的 CAM 和 PIM 框架，我们开发了动态任务调度策略，可以在 PIM 阵列之间实现近乎最佳的负载平衡。实验结果表明，与最先进的 CPU 和 GPU 平台相比，我们的方法分别实现了 167.5 倍和 28.8 倍的加速。同时，能效比 GPU 基线提高了 788.3 倍。

papers.title: A Deep Reinforcement Learning based Online Scheduling Policy for Deep Neural Network Multi-Tenant Multi-Accelerator Systems.
papers.abstract: Currently, there is a growing trend of outsourcing the execution of DNNs to cloud services. For service providers, managing multitenancy and ensuring high-quality service delivery, particularly in meeting stringent execution time constraints, assumes paramount importance, all while endeavoring to maintain cost-effectiveness. In this context, the utilization of heterogeneous multi-accelerator systems becomes increasingly relevant. This paper presents RELMAS, a low-overhead deep reinforcement learning algorithm designed for the online scheduling of DNNs in multi-tenant environments, taking into account the dataflow heterogeneity of accelerators and memory bandwidths contentions. By doing so, service providers can employ the most efficient scheduling policy for user requests, optimizing Service-Level-Agreement (SLA) satisfaction rates and enhancing hardware utilization. The application of RELMAS to a heterogeneous multi-accelerator system composed of various instances of Simba and Eyeriss sub-accelerators resulted in up to a 173% improvement in SLA satisfaction rate compared to state-of-the-art scheduling techniques across different workload scenarios, with less than a 1.5% energy overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 目前，将 DNN 的执行外包给云服务的趋势日益明显。对于服务提供商而言，管理多租户并确保高质量的服务交付（尤其是满足严格的执行时间限制）至关重要，同时还要努力保持成本效益。在这种背景下，异构多加速器系统的利用变得越来越重要。本文提出了 RELMAS，这是一种低开销的深度强化学习算法，专为多租户环境中 DNN 的在线调度而设计，同时考虑了加速器的数据流异构性和内存带宽争用。通过这样做，服务提供商可以针对用户请求采用最有效的调度策略，优化服务级别协议 (SLA) 满意度并提高硬件利用率。将 RELMAS 应用到由 Simba 和 Eyeriss 子加速器的各种实例组成的异构多加速器系统中，与不同工作负载场景中最先进的调度技术相比，SLA 满意度提高了 173%，且能源开销不到 1.5%。

papers.title: A High Level Approach to Co-Designing 3D ICs.
papers.abstract: 3D ICs promise increased logic density and reduced routing congestion over conventional monolithic 2D ICs. High level synthesis (HLS) tools promise reduced design complexity by approaching the design from a higher abstraction level and allow for more optimization flexibility. We propose improving timing closure of 3D ICs by co-designing the architecture and physical design by integrating HLS and 3D IC macro placement into the same holistic loop. On average our method is able to reduce estimated total negative slack (TNS) by 62% and 92% when compared to a traditional binding and placement technique for 2D and 3D ICs respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 与传统单片 2D IC 相比，3D IC 有望提高逻辑密度并减少布线拥塞。高级综合 (HLS) 工具有望通过从更高的抽象级别进行设计来降低设计复杂性，并提供更大的优化灵活性。我们建议通过将 HLS 和 3D IC 宏布局集成到同一个整体环路中，共同设计架构和物理设计，从而改进 3D IC 的时序收敛。平均而言，与 2D 和 3D IC 的传统绑定和放置技术相比，我们的方法能够将估计的总负裕度 (TNS) 分别减少 62% 和 92%。

papers.title: A High-Performance Stochastic Simulated Bifurcation Ising Machine.
A High-Throughput Private Inference Engine Based on 3D Stacked Memory.
papers.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) enables unlimited computation depth, allowing privacy-enhanced neural network inference tasks directly on the ciphertext. However, existing FHE architectures suffer from the memory access bottleneck. This work proposes a High-throughput FHE engine for private inference (PI) based on 3D stacked memory (H3). H3 adopts the software-hardware co-design that dynamically adjusts the polynomial decomposition during the PI process to minimize the computation and storage overhead at a fine granularity. With 3D hybrid bonding, H3 integrates a logic die with a multi-layer embedded DRAM, routing data efficiently to the processing unit array through an efficient broadcast mechanism. H3 consumes 192mm2 when implemented using a 28nm logic process. It achieves 1.36 million LeNet-5 or 920 ResNet-20 PI per minute, surpassing existing 7nm accelerators by 52%. This demonstrates that 3D memory is a promising technology to promote the performance of FHE.
papers.abstract_zh: 完全同态加密 (FHE) 可实现无限的计算深度，允许直接在密文上执行隐私增强型神经网络推理任务。然而，现有的 FHE 架构存在内存访问瓶颈。这项工作提出了一种基于 3D 堆栈内存 (H3) 的高吞吐量 FHE 引擎，用于私有推理 (PI)。 H3采用软硬件协同设计，在PI过程中动态调整多项式分解，以最小化细粒度的计算和存储开销。通过 3D 混合键合，H3 将逻辑芯片与多层嵌入式 DRAM 集成，通过高效的广播机制将数据有效地路由到处理单元阵列。当使用 28nm 逻辑工艺实现时，H3 的功耗为 192mm2。它每分钟可实现 136 万个 LeNet-5 或 920 个 ResNet-20 PI，超过现有 7nm 加速器 52%。这表明3D内存是一项很有前景的提升FHE性能的技术。

papers.title: A Holistic Functionalization Approach to Optimizing Imperative Tensor Programs in Deep Learning.
papers.abstract: As deep learning empowers various fields, many domain-specific non-neural network operators have been proposed to improve the accuracy of deep learning models. Researchers often use the imperative programming diagram (PyTorch) to express these new operators, leaving the fusion optimization of these operators to deep learning compilers. Unfortunately, the inherent side effects introduced by imperative tensor programs, especially tensor-level mutations, often make optimization extremely difficult. Previous works either fail to eliminate the side effects of tensor-level mutations or require programmers to manually analyze and transform them. In this paper, we present a holistic functionalization approach (TensorSSA) to optimizing imperative tensor programs beyond control flow boundaries. We first introduce TensorSSA intermediate representation for removing tensor-level mutation and expanding the scope and ability of operator fusion. Based on TensorSSA IR, we propose a TensorSSA conversion algorithm that performs functionalization crossing the boundary of control flow. TensorSSA achieves a 1.79X (1.34X on average) speedup in representative deep learning tasks than state-of-the-art works.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习赋能各个领域，许多特定领域的非神经网络算子被提出来提高深度学习模型的准确性。研究人员经常使用命令式编程图（PyTorch）来表达这些新的运算符，将这些运算符的融合优化留给深度学习编译器。不幸的是，命令式张量程序引入的固有副作用，尤其是张量级突变，通常使优化变得极其困难。之前的工作要么无法消除张量级突变的副作用，要么需要程序员手动分析和转换它们。在本文中，我们提出了一种整体功能化方法（TensorSSA）来优化超出控制流边界的命令式张量程序。我们首先引入 TensorSSA 中间表示，用于消除张量级变异并扩展算子融合的范围和能力。基于TensorSSA IR，我们提出了一种TensorSSA转换算法，该算法可以执行跨越控制流边界的功能化。 TensorSSA 在代表性深度学习任务中比最先进的作品实现了 1.79 倍（平均 1.34 倍）的加速。

papers.title: A HW/SW Co-Design of Video Dehazing Accelerator Using Decoupled Local Atmospheric Light Prior.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we introduce DLAPID, a novel decoupled parallel hardware-software co-design architecture for real-time video dehazing. From a software point of view, DLAPID isolates the atmospheric light operation from the initial transmission estimation to take full advantage of the hardware accelerators' parallelization features. For the hardware implementation, we deploy DLAPID both on FPGA and GPU platforms and validate its effectiveness. Using both real-world driving scenario testing sets and ground-truth datasets, we quantitatively and qualitatively assess the proposed method against several SOTA (state-of-the-art) video dehazing models. The outcomes of our experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves better dehazing performance with lower power consumption and has real-time processing capabilities, thereby preventing potential accidents of autonomous vehicles.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 DLAPID，一种用于实时视频去雾的新型解耦并行硬件软件协同设计架构。从软件角度来看，DLAPID将大气光操作与初始传输估计隔离开来，以充分利用硬件加速器的并行化功能。对于硬件实现，我们在FPGA和GPU平台上部署DLAPID并验证其有效性。使用现实世界的驾驶场景测试集和地面实况数据集，我们针对几种 SOTA（最先进的）视频去雾模型对所提出的方法进行定量和定性评估。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法以较低的功耗实现了更好的去雾性能，并且具有实时处理能力，从而防止了自动驾驶车辆的潜在事故。

papers.title: A Real-time Execution System of Multimodal Transformer through PIM-GPU Collaboration.
papers.abstract: Multimodal transformer excels in various applications, but faces great challenges such as high memory consumption and limited data reuse that hinder real-time performance. To address these issues, we propose a processing-in-memory (PIM)-GPU collaboration oriented compiler to accelerate the multimodal transformers. The PIM-GPU collaboration adapts well to multimodal transformers and significantly accelerates model inference. In addition, we introduce a tailored PIM allocation algorithm for variable-length inputs to further improve computation efficiency. Experimental results show that our scheme can achieve an average 15x end-to-end speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 多模态变压器在各种应用中表现出色，但面临着巨大的挑战，例如高内存消耗和有限的数据重用，阻碍了实时性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种面向内存处理（PIM）-GPU 协作的编译器来加速多模态转换器。 PIM-GPU 协作很好地适应了多模态转换器，并显着加速了模型推理。此外，我们还引入了针对可变长度输入的定制 PIM 分配算法，以进一步提高计算效率。实验结果表明，我们的方案可以实现平均 15 倍的端到端加速。

papers.title: A RRAM-based High Energy-efficient Accelerator Supporting Multimodal Tasks for Virtual Reality Wearable Devices.
papers.abstract: Virtual reality (VR) wearable devices can achieve immersive entertainment by fusing multi-modal tasks from various senses. However, constrained by the short battery life and limited hardware resources of the VR devices, running multiple tasks simultaneously with different modals is difficult. In this paper, we propose an energy-efficient accelerator that supports Multi-modal Tasks for VR devices, namely MTVR. We present a multi-task computing solution based on the flexible multi-task computing core design and efficient computing unit allocation strategy, which simultaneously achieves efficient work of multi-modal tasks. We design an early exit detector to skip invalid calculations, greatly saving energy. In addition, a fine-grained tiny value skip method at multiplier and adder levels is proposed to save energy further. We provide a hybrid RRAM and SRAM memory access scheme, reducing the external memory access (EMA). Through experimental evaluation, the multitask computing core achieves an average computational utilization of 95%. When the invalid input ratio is 90%, energy saving brought by the early exit detector can reach 88%. The tiny value skip method further achieved 13% energy saving. Hybrid memory access scheme obtains 98.9% EMA reduction. We deployed the MTVR accelerator in FPGA and self-designed RRAM, achieving energy efficiency of 3.6 TOPS/W, higher than other single-task accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 虚拟现实（VR）可穿戴设备可以通过融合多种感官的多模态任务来实现沉浸式娱乐。然而，受VR设备电池寿命短和硬件资源有限的限制，以不同模式同时运行多个任务是很困难的。在本文中，我们提出了一种支持 VR 设备多模式任务的节能加速器，即 MTVR。我们提出了一种基于灵活的多任务计算核心设计和高效的计算单元分配策略的多任务计算解决方案，同时实现了多模态任务的高效工作。我们设计了一个早期退出检测器来跳过无效计算，大大节省能源。此外，还提出了乘法器和加法器级别的细粒度微小值跳跃方法，以进一步节省能量。我们提供混合 RRAM 和 SRAM 存储器访问方案，减少外部存储器访问 (EMA)。通过实验评估，多任务计算核心的平均计算利用率达到95%。当无效输入比例为90%时，提前退出检测器带来的节能可达88%。微小值跳跃方法进一步实现了13%的节能。混合内存访问方案获得了 98.9% 的 EMA 降低。我们将MTVR加速器部署在FPGA和自行设计的RRAM中，实现了3.6 TOPS/W的能效，高于其他单任务加速器。

papers.title: A Software-Hardware Co-design Solution for 3D Inner Structure Reconstruction.
papers.abstract: Volume imaging (3D model with inner structure) is widely applied to various areas, such as medical diagnosis and archaeology. Especially during the COVID-19 pandemic, there is a great demand for lung CT. However, it is quite time-consuming to generate a 3D model by reconstructing the internal structure of an object. To make things worse, due to the poor data locality of the reconstruction algorithm, researchers are pessimistic about accelerating it with ASIC. Besides the locality issue, we find that the complex synchronization is also a major obstacle for 3D reconstruction. To overcome the problems, we propose a holistic solution using software-hardware co-design. We first provide a unified programming model to cover various 3D reconstruction tasks. Then, we redesign the dataflow of the reconstruction algorithm to improve data locality. In addition, we remove unnecessary synchronizations by carefully analyzing the data dependency. After that, we propose a novel near-memory acceleration architecture, called Waffle, for further improvement. Experiment results show that Waffle in a package can achieve 3.51× ~ 3.96× speedup over a cluster of 10 GPUs with 9.35× ~ 10.97× energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 体积成像（具有内部结构的3D模型）广泛应用于医学诊断和考古等各个领域。特别是在COVID-19大流行期间，对肺部CT的需求很大。然而，通过重建物体的内部结构来生成3D模型是相当耗时的。更糟糕的是，由于重建算法的数据局部性较差，研究人员对用 ASIC 加速它持悲观态度。除了局部性问题之外，我们发现复杂的同步也是 3D 重建的主要障碍。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了使用软硬件协同设计的整体解决方案。我们首先提供一个统一的编程模型来涵盖各种 3D 重建任务。然后，我们重新设计了重建算法的数据流以提高数据局部性。此外，我们通过仔细分析数据依赖性来删除不必要的同步。之后，我们提出了一种新颖的近内存加速架构，称为 Waffle，以进行进一步改进。实验结果表明，在一个封装中的 Waffle 可以在 10 个 GPU 的集群上实现 3.51× ~ 3.96× 的加速，并具有 9.35× ~ 10.97× 的能效。

papers.title: Accel-NASBench: Sustainable Benchmarking for Accelerator-Aware NAS.
papers.abstract: One of the primary challenges impeding the progress of Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is its extensive reliance on exorbitant computational resources. NAS benchmarks aim to simulate runs of NAS experiments at zero cost, remediating the need for extensive compute. However, existing NAS benchmarks use synthetic datasets and model proxies that make simplified assumptions about the characteristics of these datasets and models, leading to unrealistic evaluations. We present a technique that allows searching for training proxies that reduce the cost of benchmark construction by significant margins, making it possible to construct realistic NAS benchmarks for large-scale datasets. Using this technique, we construct an open-source bi-objective NAS benchmark for the ImageNet2012 dataset combined with the on-device performance of accelerators, including GPUs, TPUs, and FPGAs. Through extensive experimentation with various NAS optimizers and hardware platforms, we show that the benchmark is accurate and allows searching for state-of-the-art hardware-aware models at zero cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 阻碍神经架构搜索（NAS）进步的主要挑战之一是其对过高计算资源的广泛依赖。 NAS 基准测试旨在以零成本模拟 NAS 实验的运行，从而弥补对大量计算的需求。然而，现有的 NAS 基准使用合成数据集和模型代理，对这些数据集和模型的特征做出简化的假设，导致评估不切实际。我们提出了一种技术，允许搜索训练代理，从而显着降低基准构建的成本，从而可以为大规模数据集构建真实的 NAS 基准。使用这种技术，我们结合了加速器（包括 GPU、TPU 和 FPGA）的设备上性能，为 ImageNet2012 数据集构建了一个开源双目标 NAS 基准。通过对各种 NAS 优化器和硬件平台的广泛实验，我们表明该基准测试是准确的，并且允许以零成本搜索最先进的硬件感知模型。

papers.title: Accelerating DTCO with a Sample-Efficient Active Learning Framework for TCAD Device Modeling.
papers.abstract: Design-Technology Co-Optimization (DTCO) can be significantly accelerated by employing Neural Compact Models (NCMs). However, the effective deployment of NCMs requires a substantial amount of training data for accurate device modeling. This paper introduces an Active Learning (AL) framework designed to enhance the efficiency of both device modeling and process optimization, particularly addressing the challenges of time-intensive Technology Computer-Aided Design (TCAD) simulations. The framework employs a ranking algorithm that assesses metrics such as the expected variance from the neural tangent kernel (NTK), TCAD simulation time, and the complexity of I-V curves. This strategy considerably reduces the number of required simulations while maintaining high accuracy. Demonstrating the effectiveness of our AL framework, we achieved a 28.5% improvement in MSE within a 30-minute time budget for device modeling, and an 86.7% reduction in the data points required for process optimization of a 51-stage ring oscillator (RO). These results offer a streamlined, adaptable solution for rapid device modeling and process optimization in various DTCO applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过采用神经紧凑模型 (NCM) 可以显着加速设计技术协同优化 (DTCO)。然而，NCM 的有效部署需要大量的训练数据来进行准确的设备建模。本文介绍了一种主动学习（AL）框架，旨在提高设备建模和流程优化的效率，特别是解决时间密集型技术计算机辅助设计（TCAD）模拟的挑战。该框架采用排名算法来评估神经正切核 (NTK) 的预期方差、TCAD 模拟时间和 I-V 曲线的复杂性等指标。该策略大大减少了所需模拟的数量，同时保持了高精度。为了证明我们的 AL 框架的有效性，我们在器件建模的 30 分钟时间预算内实现了 MSE 提高了 28.5%，并且 51 级环形振荡器 (RO) 流程优化所需的数据点减少了 86.7%。这些结果为各种 DTCO 应用中的快速设备建模和流程优化提供了简化、适应性强的解决方案。

papers.title: Accelerating Regular Path Queries over Graph Database with Processing-in-Memory.
papers.abstract: Regular path queries (RPQs) in graph databases are bottlenecked by the memory wall. Emerging processing-in-memory (PIM) technologies offer a promising solution to dispatch and execute path matching tasks in parallel within PIM modules. We present Moctopus, a PIM-based data management system for graph databases that supports efficient batch RPQs and graph updates. Moctopus employs a PIM-friendly dynamic graph partitioning algorithm, which tackles graph skewness and preserves graph locality with low overhead for RPQ processing. Moctopus enables efficient graph update by amortizing the host CPU's update overhead to PIM modules. Evaluation of Moctopus demonstrates superiority over the state-of-the-art traditional graph database.
papers.abstract_zh: 图数据库中的常规路径查询（RPQ）受到内存墙的瓶颈。新兴的内存处理 (PIM) 技术提供了一种有前途的解决方案，可以在 PIM 模块内并行调度和执行路径匹配任务。我们推出了 Moctopus，这是一种基于 PIM 的图形数据库数据管理系统，支持高效的批量 RPQ 和图形更新。 Moctopus 采用 PIM 友好的动态图分区算法，该算法可以解决图偏斜问题并以较低的 RPQ 处理开销保留图局部性。 Moctopus 通过将主机 CPU 的更新开销分摊到 PIM 模块来实现高效的图形更新。 Moctopus 的评估显示了相对于最先进的传统图数据库的优越性。

papers.title: AccMoS: Accelerating Model Simulation for Simulink via Code Generation.
papers.abstract: Simulink has been widely used in embedded software development, which supports simulation to validate the correctness of the constructed models. However, as the scale and complexity of models in industrial applications grow, it is time-consuming for the simulation engine of Simulink to achieve high coverage and detect potential errors, especially accumulative errors.
papers.abstract_zh: Simulink已广泛应用于嵌入式软件开发，它支持仿真来验证所构建模型的正确性。然而，随着工业应用中模型的规模和复杂性的增长，Simulink的仿真引擎要实现高覆盖率并检测潜在的错误，特别是累积错误是非常耗时的。

papers.title: AdaptiveFL: Adaptive Heterogeneous Federated Learning for Resource-Constrained AIoT Systems.
papers.abstract: Although Federated Learning (FL) is promising to enable collaborative learning among Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) devices, it suffers from the problem of low classification performance due to various heterogeneity factors (e.g., computing capacity, memory size) of devices and uncertain operating environments. To address these issues, this paper introduces an effective FL approach named AdaptiveFL based on a novel fine-grained width-wise model pruning mechanism, which can generate various heterogeneous local models for heterogeneous AIoT devices. By using our proposed reinforcement learning-based device selection strategy, AdaptiveFL can adaptively dispatch suitable heterogeneous models to corresponding AIoT devices based on their available resources for local training. Experimental results show that, compared to state-of-the-art methods, AdaptiveFL can achieve up to 8.94% inference improvements for both IID and non-IID scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管联邦学习（FL）有望实现人工智能物联网（AIoT）设备之间的协作学习，但由于设备的各种异构因素（例如计算能力、内存大小）和不确定的操作环境，它面临着分类性能低的问题。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种名为 AdaptiveFL 的有效 FL 方法，该方法基于一种新颖的细粒度宽度模型修剪机制，可以为异构 AIoT 设备生成各种异构局部模型。通过使用我们提出的基于强化学习的设备选择策略，AdaptiveFL 可以根据本地训练的可用资源，自适应地将合适的异构模型分配给相应的 AIoT 设备。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，AdaptiveFL 对于 IID 和非 IID 场景都能实现高达 8.94% 的推理改进。

papers.title: AdderNet 2.0: Optimal FPGA Acceleration of AdderNet with Activation-Oriented Quantization and Fused Bias Removal based Memory Optimization.
papers.abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are computationally demanding due to expensive Multiply-ACcumulate (MAC) operations. Emerging neural network models, such as AdderNet, exploit efficient arithmetic alternatives like sum-of-absolute-difference (SAD) operations to replace the costly MAC operations, while still achieving competitive model accuracy as the CNN counterparts. Nevertheless, existing AdderNet accelerators still face critical implementation challenges to achieve maximal hardware and energy efficiency. This paper presents AdderNet 2.0, an algorithm-hardware co-design framework featuring a novel Activation-Oriented Quantization (AOQ) strategy, a Fused Bias Removal (FBR) scheme for on-chip feature memory bitwidth reduction, and optimal PE designs to improve the overall resource utilization towards optimal AdderNet accelerator designs. Multiple AdderNet 2.0 accelerator design variants were implemented on Xilinx KV-260 FPGA. Experimental results show that the INT6 AdderNet 2.0 accelerators achieve significant hardware resource and energy savings when compared to prior CNN and AdderNet designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于昂贵的乘法累加 (MAC) 操作，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的计算要求很高。 AdderNet 等新兴神经网络模型利用绝对差和 (SAD) 运算等高效算术替代方案来取代成本高昂的 MAC 运算，同时仍能实现与 CNN 模型相当的竞争模型精度。尽管如此，现有的 AdderNet 加速器仍然面临着实现最大硬件和能源效率的关键实施挑战。本文介绍了 AdderNet 2.0，这是一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，具有新颖的面向激活量化 (AOQ) 策略、用于减少片上特征存储器位宽的融合偏差消除 (FBR) 方案以及用于提高整体资源利用率的最佳 PE 设计，以实现最佳 AdderNet 加速器设计。在 Xilinx KV-260 FPGA 上实现了多个 AdderNet 2.0 加速器设计变体。实验结果表明，与之前的 CNN 和 AdderNet 设计相比，INT6 AdderNet 2.0 加速器可显着节省硬件资源和能源。

papers.title: Addition is Most You Need: Efficient Floating-Point SRAM Compute-in-Memory by Harnessing Mantissa Addition.
papers.abstract: The compute-in-memory (CIM) paradigm holds great promise to efficiently accelerate machine learning workloads. Among memory devices, static random-access memory (SRAM) stands out as a practical choice for its exceptional reliability in the digital domain and excellent scalability. Recently, there has been a growing interest in accelerating floating-point (FP) deep neural networks (DNNs) with SRAM CIM due to their critical importance in DNN training and high-accurate inference. This paper proposes an energy-efficient SRAM CIM macro for FP DNNs. To achieve the design, we identify a lightweight approach that decomposes conventional FP mantissa multiplication into two parts: mantissa sub-addition (sub-ADD) and mantissa sub-multiplication (sub-MUL). Our study shows that while mantissa sub-MUL is compute-intensive, it only contributes to the minority of FP products, whereas mantissa sub-ADD, although compute-light, accounts for the majority of FP products. Recognizing "Addition is Most You Need", we develop a novel hybrid-domain SRAM CIM macro to accurately handle mantissa sub-ADD in the digital domain while improving the energy efficiency of mantissa sub-MUL using analog computing. Experiments with the MLPerf benchmark show its remarkable improvement in energy efficiency on average by 3×~ 3.6× (2.5×~3.1×) in inference (training) compared to a fully digital baseline without any accuracy loss, showcasing its great potential for FP DNN acceleration.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存计算 (CIM) 范式有望有效加速机器学习工作负载。在存储器件中，静态随机存取存储器 (SRAM) 因其在数字领域的卓越可靠性和出色的可扩展性而脱颖而出，成为实用的选择。最近，人们越来越关注使用 SRAM CIM 加速浮点 (FP) 深度神经网络 (DNN)，因为它们在 DNN 训练和高精度推理中至关重要。本文提出了一种用于 FP DNN 的节能 SRAM CIM 宏。为了实现该设计，我们确定了一种轻量级方法，将传统的 FP 尾数乘法分解为两部分：尾数子加法 (sub-ADD) 和尾数子乘法 (sub-MUL)。我们的研究表明，虽然尾数 sub-MUL 是计算密集型的，但它只对少数 FP 产品有贡献，而尾数 sub-ADD 虽然计算量较小，但占 FP 产品的大部分。认识到“加法是您最需要的”，我们开发了一种新型混合域 SRAM CIM 宏，可以准确处理数字域中的尾数子 ADD，同时使用模拟计算提高尾数子 MUL 的能效。 MLPerf基准的实验表明，与全数字基准相比，其在推理（训练）方面的能源效率平均显着提高了3×~3.6×（2.5×~3.1×），且没有任何精度损失，展示了其FP DNN加速的巨大潜力。

papers.title: Advanced gate-level glitch modeling using ANNs.
papers.abstract: Multiple Input Switching (MIS) effects commonly induce undesired glitch pulses at the output of CMOS gates, potentially leading to circuit malfunction and significant power consumption. Thus, accurate and efficient glitch modeling is crucial for the design of high-performance, low-power, and reliable ICs. In this work, we present a new gate-level approach for modeling glitch effects under MIS. Unlike previous studies, we leverage efficient Machine Learning (ML) techniques to accurately estimate the glitch shape characteristics, propagation delay, and power consumption. To this end, we evaluate various ML engines and explore different Artificial Neural Network (ANN) architectures. Moreover, we introduce a seamless workflow to integrate our ANNs into existing standard cell libraries, striking an optimal balance between model size and accuracy in gate-level glitch modeling. Experimental evaluation on gates implemented in 7 nm FinFET technology demonstrates that the proposed models achieve an average error of 2.19% against SPICE simulation while maintaining a minimal memory footprint.
papers.abstract_zh: 多输入开关 (MIS) 效应通常会在 CMOS 门的输出端产生不需要的毛刺脉冲，从而可能导致电路故障和显着的功耗。因此，准确、高效的毛刺建模对于高性能、低功耗和可靠 IC 的设计至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的门级方法，用于在 MIS 下对毛刺效应进行建模。与之前的研究不同，我们利用高效的机器学习（ML）技术来准确估计毛刺形状特征、传播延迟和功耗。为此，我们评估了各种机器学习引擎并探索了不同的人工神经网络 (ANN) 架构。此外，我们引入了无缝工作流程，将我们的人工神经网络集成到现有的标准单元库中，从而在门级毛刺建模中的模型大小和准确性之间取得最佳平衡。对 7 nm FinFET 技术中实现的栅极进行的实验评估表明，所提出的模型相对于 SPICE 仿真的平均误差为 2.19%，同时保持最小的内存占用。

papers.title: Advanced Reinforcement Learning Algorithms to Optimize Design Verification.
papers.abstract: Given the increasing complexity of integrated circuits, the utilization of machine learning in simulation-based hardware design verification (DV) has become crucial to ensure comprehensive coverage of hard-to-hit states. Our paper proposes a deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) algorithm combined with prioritized experience replay (PER) to determine the stimulus settings that result in the highest average FIFO depth in a modified exclusive shared invalid (MESI) cache controller architecture. This architecture includes four FIFOs, each corresponding to a distinct CPU. Through extensive experimentation, DDPG coupled with PER (DDPG-PER) proves to be more effective than DDPG with uniform experience replay in enhancing average FIFO depth and coverage within the DV process. Furthermore, our proposed DDPG-PER framework significantly increases the occurrence of higher FIFO depths, thereby addressing the challenges associated with reaching hard-to-hit states in DV. The proposed DDPG-PER and DDPG algorithms also demonstrate a larger average FIFO depth over four CPUs, requiring considerably less execution time than Bayesian Optimization (BO).
papers.abstract_zh: 鉴于集成电路的复杂性不断增加，在基于仿真的硬件设计验证（DV）中利用机器学习对于确保全面覆盖难以命中的状态变得至关重要。我们的论文提出了一种深度确定性策略梯度 (DDPG) 算法，与优先体验重放 (PER) 相结合，以确定在改进的独占共享无效 (MESI) 缓存控制器架构中产生最高平均 FIFO 深度的刺激设置。该架构包括四个 FIFO，每个 FIFO 对应一个不同的 CPU。通过大量的实验，DDPG 与 PER 结合（DDPG-PER）被证明比具有统一经验回放的 DDPG 更有效地增强了 DV 过程中的平均 FIFO 深度和覆盖范围。此外，我们提出的 DDPG-PER 框架显着增加了更高 FIFO 深度的出现，从而解决了与达到 DV 中难以命中状态相关的挑战。所提出的 DDPG-PER 和 DDPG 算法还展示了四个 CPU 上更大的平均 FIFO 深度，所需的执行时间比贝叶斯优化 (BO) 少得多。

papers.title: AdvHunter: Detecting Adversarial Perturbations in Black-Box Neural Networks through Hardware Performance Counters.
papers.abstract: The paper introduces AdvHunter, a novel strategy to detect adversarial examples (AEs) in Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). AdvHunter operates effectively in practical black-box scenarios, where only hard-label query access is available, a situation often encountered with proprietary DNNs. This differentiates it from existing defenses, which usually rely on white-box access or need to be integrated during the training phase - requirements often not feasible with proprietary DNNs. AdvHunter functions by monitoring data flow dynamics within the computational environment during the inference phase of DNNs. It utilizes Hardware Performance Counters to monitor microarchitectural activities and employs principles of Gaussian Mixture Models to detect AEs. Extensive evaluation across various datasets, DNN architectures, and adversarial perturbations demonstrate the effectiveness of AdvHunter.
papers.abstract_zh: 该论文介绍了 AdvHunter，这是一种在深度神经网络 (DNN) 中检测对抗样本 (AE) 的新策略。 AdvHunter 在实际的黑盒场景中有效运行，其中仅提供硬标签查询访问，这是专有 DNN 经常遇到的情况。这与现有的防御措施不同，现有的防御措施通常依赖于白盒访问或需要在训练阶段进行集成，而这些要求对于专有的 DNN 来说通常是不可行的。 AdvHunter 通过在 DNN 推理阶段监控计算环境中的数据流动态来发挥作用。它利用硬件性能计数器来监控微体系结构活动，并采用高斯混合模型的原理来检测 AE。对各种数据集、DNN 架构和对抗性扰动的广泛评估证明了 AdvHunter 的有效性。

papers.title: AIG-CIM: A Scalable Chiplet Module with Tri-Gear Heterogeneous Compute-in-Memory for Diffusion Acceleration.
papers.abstract: The emergence of Diffusion models has gained significant attention in the field of Artificial Intelligence Generated Content. While Diffusion demonstrates impressive image generation capability, it faces hardware deployment challenges due to its unique model architecture and computation requirement. In this paper, we present a hardware accelerator design, i.e. AIG-CIM, which incorporates tri-gear heterogeneous digital compute-in-memory to address the flexible data reuse demands in Diffusion models. Our framework offers a collaborative design methodology for large generative models from the computational circuit-level to the multi-chip-module system-level. We implemented and evaluated the AIG-CIM accelerator using TSMC 22nm technology. For several Diffusion inferences, scalable AIG-CIM chiplets achieve 21.3× latency reduction, up to 231.2× throughput improvement and three orders of magnitude energy efficiency improvement compared to RTX 3090 GPU.
papers.abstract_zh: 扩散模型的出现在人工智能生成内容领域引起了广泛关注。虽然 Diffusion 展示了令人印象深刻的图像生成能力，但由于其独特的模型架构和计算要求，它面临着硬件部署挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种硬件加速器设计，即 AIG-CIM，它结合了三档异构数字内存计算，以满足扩散模型中灵活的数据重用需求。我们的框架为从计算电路级到多芯片模块系统级的大型生成模型提供了协作设计方法。我们使用 TSMC 22nm 技术实施并评估了 AIG-CIM 加速器。对于多项 Diffusion 推理，与 RTX 3090 GPU 相比，可扩展的 AIG-CIM 小芯片实现了 21.3 倍的延迟减少、高达 231.2 倍的吞吐量提升以及三个数量级的能效提升。

papers.title: Alchemist: A Unified Accelerator Architecture for Cross-Scheme Fully Homomorphic Encryption.
papers.abstract: The use of cross-scheme fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) in privacy-preserving applications present to be a new challenge to hardware accelerator design. Existing accelerator architectures with customized polynomial-level operator abstraction fail to efficiently handle hybrid FHE schemes due to the mismatch between computational demands and available hardware resources under various parameter settings. In this work, we propose a new accelerator architecture that consists of a novel finer-grained low-level operator, i.e., Meta-OP, that not only mathematically supports a diverse range of polynomial operations, but is also hardware-friendly for accelerator design without complex topological logic. We then design a new slot-based data management scheme to efficiently handle the distinct memory access patterns over the Meta-OP. With a slot-based data management approach, Alchemist can accelerate both arithmetic and logic FHE workloads with high hardware utilization rates. In the experiment, we show that Alchemist is up to 24,829X faster than CPU. For arithmetic FHE, compared with the SOTA ASIC accelerators, Alchemist achieves a 29.4X performance per area improvement on average. For logic FHE, compared with the SOTA ASIC accelerators, Alchemist achieves a 7.0X overall speed up on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 在隐私保护应用中使用跨方案全同态加密（FHE）对硬件加速器设计提出了新的挑战。由于各种参数设置下计算需求与可用硬件资源之间的不匹配，具有定制多项式级算子抽象的现有加速器架构无法有效地处理混合 FHE 方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的加速器架构，它由一种新颖的更细粒度的低级运算符（即 Meta-OP）组成，它不仅在数学上支持各种多项式运算，而且对于加速器设计来说也是硬件友好的，无需复杂的拓扑逻辑。然后，我们设计了一种新的基于槽的数据管理方案，以有效地处理 Meta-OP 上不同的内存访问模式。通过基于槽的数据管理方法，Alchemist 可以加速算术和逻辑 FHE 工作负载，并具有较高的硬件利用率。在实验中，我们表明 Alchemist 的速度比 CPU 快 24,829 倍。对于算术 FHE，与 SOTA ASIC 加速器相比，Alchemist 平均每面积性能提高了 29.4 倍。对于逻辑 FHE，与 SOTA ASIC 加速器相比，Alchemist 平均实现了 7.0 倍的整体加速。

papers.title: Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design of Distribution-Aware Logarithmic-Posit Encodings for Efficient DNN Inference.
papers.abstract: Traditional Deep Neural Network (DNN) quantization methods using integer or floating-point data types struggle to capture diverse DNN parameter distributions and often require large silicon overhead and intensive quantization-aware training. In this study, we introduce Logarithmic Posits (LP), an adaptive, hardware-friendly data type inspired by posits that dynamically adapts to DNN weight/activation distributions by parameterizing LP bit fields. We also develop a novel genetic-algorithm based framework, LP Quantization (LPQ), to find optimal layer-wise LP parameters while reducing representational divergence between quantized and full-precision models through a novel global-local contrastive objective. Additionally, we design a LP accelerator (LPA) architecture comprising of mixed-precision LP processing elements (PEs). Our algorithmhardware co-design demonstrates on average <1% drop in top-1 accuracy across various CNN and ViT models. It also achieves ~ 2× improvements in performance per unit area and 2.2× gains in energy efficiency compared to state-of-the-art quantization accelerators using different data types.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用整数或浮点数据类型的传统深度神经网络 (DNN) 量化方法很难捕获不同的 DNN 参数分布，并且通常需要大量的芯片开销和密集的量化感知训练。在本研究中，我们引入了对数位置 (LP)，这是一种自适应的、硬件友好的数据类型，其灵感来自于通过参数化 LP 位字段动态适应 DNN 权重/激活分布的位置。我们还开发了一种基于遗传算法的新型框架，LP 量化（LPQ），以找到最佳的逐层 LP 参数，同时通过新颖的全局-局部对比目标减少量化模型和全精度模型之间的表征差异。此外，我们还设计了由混合精度 LP 处理元件 (PE) 组成的 LP 加速器 (LPA) 架构。我们的算法硬件协同设计表明，各种 CNN 和 ViT 模型的 top-1 准确率平均下降 <1%。与使用不同数据类型的最先进的量化加速器相比，它的单位面积性能提高了约 2 倍，能源效率提高了 2.2 倍。

papers.title: ALVEARE: a Domain-Specific Framework for Regular Expressions.
papers.abstract: Regular Expression (RE) matching enables the identification of patterns in datastreams of heterogeneous fields ranging from proteomics to computer security. These scenarios require massive data analysis that, combined with the high data dependency of the REs, leads to long computational times and high energy consumption. Currently, RE engines rely on either (1) flexibility in run-time RE changes and broad operators support impairing performance or (2) fixed high-performing accelerators implementing few simple RE operators. To overcome these limitations, we propose ALVEARE: a hardware-software approach combining a Domain-Specific Language (DSL) with an embedded Domain-Specific Architecture. We exploit REs as a DSL by translating them into flexible executables through our RISC-based Instruction Set Architecture that expresses from simple to advanced primitives. Then, we design a speculation-based microarchitecture to execute real benchmarks efficiently. ALVEARE provides RE-domain flexibility and broad operators' support and achieves up to 34× speedup and 57× energy efficiency improvements against the state-of-the-art RE2 and Bluefield DPU 2 with its RE accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 正则表达式 (RE) 匹配能够识别从蛋白质组学到计算机安全等异构领域的数据流中的模式。这些场景需要大量数据分析，再加上 RE 的高数据依赖性，导致计算时间长、能耗高。目前，RE 引擎依赖于（1）运行时 RE 变化的灵活性和广泛的算子支持损害性能或（2）固定的高性能加速器实现一些简单的 RE 算子。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了 ALVEARE：一种将特定领域语言 (DSL) 与嵌入式特定领域架构相结合的硬件软件方法。我们将 RE 用作 DSL，通过我们基于 RISC 的指令集架构将其转换为灵活的可执行文件，该架构可表达从简单到高级的原语。然后，我们设计了一个基于推测的微架构来有效地执行真实的基准测试。 ALVEARE 提供 RE 域灵活性和广泛的运营商支持，并通过其 RE 加速器，与最先进的 RE2 和 Bluefield DPU 2 相比，实现高达 34 倍的加速和 57 倍的能效改进。

papers.title: An Efficient Hardware Accelerator Design for Dynamic Graph Convolutional Network (DGCN) Inference.
An In-Memory Computing Accelerator with Reconfigurable Dataflow for Multi-Scale Vision Transformer with Hybrid Topology.
papers.abstract: Transformer models equipped with multi-head attention (MHA) mechanism have demonstrated promise in computer vision (CV) tasks, i.e., vision transformers (ViTs). Nevertheless, the lack of inductive bias in ViTs leads to substantial computational and storage requirements, hindering their deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. To this end, multi-scale hybrid models are proposed to take the advantages of both transformers and convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, existing domain-specific architectures focus on the optimization of either convolution or MHA at the expense of flexibility. In this work, an in-memory computing (IMC) accelerator is proposed to efficiently accelerate ViTs with hybrid MHA and convolution topology by introducing pipeline reordering. SRAM-based digital IMC macro is utilized to mitigate memory access bottleneck, while avoiding analog non-ideality. The reconfigurable processing engines and interconnections are investigated to enable the adaptable mapping of both convolution and MHA. Under typical workloads, experimental results exhibit that our proposed IMC architecture delivers 2.20× to 2.52× speedup and 40.6% to 74.8% energy reduction compared with the baseline design.
papers.abstract_zh: 配备多头注意力（MHA）机制的 Transformer 模型在计算机视觉（CV）任务中展现出了良好的前景，即视觉 Transformer（ViT）。然而，ViT 缺乏归纳偏差导致大量的计算和存储需求，阻碍了它们在资源受限的边缘设备上的部署。为此，提出了多尺度混合模型，以利用 Transformer 和卷积神经网络（CNN）的优点。然而，现有的特定领域架构侧重于卷积或 MHA 的优化，但牺牲了灵活性。在这项工作中，提出了一种内存计算（IMC）加速器，通过引入管道重新排序，利用混合 MHA 和卷积拓扑来有效加速 ViT。基于 SRAM 的数字 IMC 宏用于缓解内存访问瓶颈，同时避免模拟非理想性。研究了可重构处理引擎和互连，以实现卷积和 MHA 的自适应映射。在典型工作负载下，实验结果表明，与基准设计相比，我们提出的 IMC 架构可实现 2.20 倍至 2.52 倍的加速和 40.6% 至 74.8% 的能耗降低。

papers.title: An IP-Agnostic Foundational Cell Array Offering Supply Chain Security.
papers.abstract: Growing IC manufacturing complexity and reliance on third-party fabrication create supply chain fragility, contributing to chip shortages and IP security risks. General-purpose ICs can mitigate manufacturing security risks but rely on software-based configurations, which is not optimal for high-consequence applications. Our work proposes a novel IP-agnostic Foundational Cell Array (FC-Array) platform to overcome these challenges. Built on verified standard cells and industry-standard EDA tools, this platform preserves many advantages of an ASIC. By incorporating 3D split manufacturing, we provide semantically secure IP protection and a base wafer that can be stockpiled. Our tests demonstrate both power-efficient (100 MHz) and high-performance (1 GHz) options. In a post-place-and-route simulated 28nm design, our FC-Array shows a worst-case 1.85x increase in power consumption and a 2.61x increase in area compared to standard cell ASICs for equivalent timing performance.
papers.abstract_zh: IC 制造复杂性不断增加以及对第三方制造的依赖导致供应链脆弱，导致芯片短缺和 IP 安全风险。通用 IC 可以降低制造安全风险，但依赖于基于软件的配置，这对于高后果应用来说并不是最佳选择。我们的工作提出了一种新颖的与 IP 无关的基础单元阵列 (FC-Array) 平台来克服这些挑战。该平台基于经过验证的标准单元和行业标准 EDA 工具构建，保留了 ASIC 的许多优点。通过整合 3D 分割制造，我们提供语义上安全的 IP 保护和可储存的基础晶圆。我们的测试展示了高能效 (100 MHz) 和高性能 (1​​ GHz) 选项。在布局布线后模拟 28nm 设计中，与具有同等时序性能的标准单元 ASIC 相比，我们的 FC 阵列在最坏情况下功耗增加了 1.85 倍，面积增加了 2.61 倍。

papers.title: An NTT/INTT Accelerator with Ultra-High Throughput and Area Efficiency for FHE.
papers.abstract: As a core arithmetic operation and security guarantee of Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE), Number Theoretic Transform (NTT) of a large degree is the primary source of computational and time overhead. In this paper, we propose a scalable and conflict-free memory mapping algorithm that breaks the memory bound and releases a large amount of on-chip resources. A flexible and no-stall hardware/software pipeline architecture is designed to boost the throughput of NTT/INTT of N = 216 to over 48,543 operations per second with area efficiency, which 4× and 10× speed up the FPGA-based (HPCA'23) and GPU-based (HPCA'23) schemes.
papers.abstract_zh: 数论变换(NTT)作为全同态加密(FHE)的核心算术运算和安全保障，很大程度上是计算量和时间开销的主要来源。在本文中，我们提出了一种可扩展且无冲突的内存映射算法，该算法打破了内存限制并释放了大量的片上资源。灵活且无停顿的硬件/软件管道架构旨在将 N = 216 的 NTT/INTT 吞吐量提高到每秒超过 48,543 次操作，并具有面积效率，这将基于 FPGA (HPCA'23) 和基于 GPU (HPCA'23) 方案的速度提高了 4 倍和 10 倍。

papers.title: Annotating Slack Directly on Your Verilog: Fine-Grained RTL Timing Evaluation for Early Optimization.
papers.abstract: In digital IC design, compared with post-synthesis netlists or layouts, the early register-transfer level (RTL) stage offers greater optimization flexibility for both designers and EDA tools. However, timing information is typically unavailable at this early stage. Some recent machine learning (ML) solutions propose to predict the total negative slack (TNS) and worst negative slack (WNS) of an entire design at the RTL stage, but the fine-grained timing information of individual registers remains unavailable. In this work, we address the unique challenges of RTL timing prediction and introduce our solution named RTL-Timer. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first fine-grained general timing estimator applicable to any given design. RTL-Timer explores multiple promising RTL representations and proposes customized loss functions to capture the maximum arrival time at register endpoints. RTL-Timer's finegrained predictions are further applied to guide optimization in a standard synthesis flow. The average results on unknown test designs demonstrate a correlation above 0.89, contributing around 3% WNS and 10% TNS improvement after optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 在数字 IC 设计中，与综合后网表或布局相比，早期寄存器传输级 (RTL) 阶段为设计人员和 EDA 工具提供了更大的优化灵活性。然而，在早期阶段通常无法获得时序信息。最近的一些机器学习 (ML) 解决方案建议在 RTL 阶段预测整个设计的总负裕量 (TNS) 和最差负裕量 (WNS)，但各个寄存器的细粒度时序信息仍然不可用。在这项工作中，我们解决了 RTL 时序预测的独特挑战，并介绍了我们名为 RTL-Timer 的解决方案。据我们所知，这是第一个适用于任何给定设计的细粒度通用时序估计器。 RTL-Timer 探索了多种有前途的 RTL 表示形式，并提出了定制的损失函数来捕获寄存器端点的最大到达时间。 RTL-Timer 的细粒度预测进一步应用于指导标准合成流程中的优化。未知测试设计的平均结果显示相关性高于 0.89，优化后 WNS 提高了约 3%，TNS 提高了 10%。

papers.title: APTQ: Attention-aware Post-Training Mixed-Precision Quantization for Large Language Models.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have greatly advanced the natural language processing paradigm. However, the high computational load and huge model sizes pose a grand challenge for deployment on edge devices. To this end, we propose APTQ (Attention-aware Post-Training Mixed-Precision Quantization) for LLMs, which considers not only the second-order information of each layer's weights, but also, for the first time, the nonlinear effect of attention outputs on the entire model. We leverage the Hessian trace as a sensitivity metric for mixed-precision quantization, ensuring an informed precision reduction that retains model performance. Experiments show APTQ surpasses previous quantization methods, achieving an average of 4 bit width a 5.22 perplexity nearly equivalent to full precision in the C4 dataset. In addition, APTQ attains state-of-the-art zero-shot accuracy of 68.24% and 70.48% at an average bitwidth of 3.8 in LLaMa-7B and LLaMa-13B, respectively, demonstrating its effectiveness to produce high-quality quantized LLMs.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 极大地推进了自然语言处理范式。然而，高计算负载和巨大的模型尺寸对边缘设备上的部署提出了巨大的挑战。为此，我们提出了LLM的APTQ（Attention-aware Post-Training Mixed-Precision Quantization），它不仅考虑了每层权重的二阶信息，而且首次考虑了注意力输出对整个模型的非线性影响。我们利用 Hessian 迹作为混合精度量化的灵敏度指标，确保在保持模型性能的同时进行明智的精度降低。实验表明，APTQ 超越了以前的量化方法，实现了平均 4 位宽度和 5.22 的困惑度，几乎相当于 C4 数据集中的全精度。此外，APTQ 在 LLaMa-7B 和 LLaMa-13B 中以 3.8 的平均位宽分别实现了最先进的零样本精度 68.24% 和 70.48%，证明了其生成高质量量化 LLM 的有效性。

papers.title: Arbitrary-size Multi-layer OARSMT RL Router Trained with Combinatorial Monte-Carlo Tree Search.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a novel reinforcement-learning-trained router for building a multi-layer obstacle-avoiding rectilinear Steiner minimum tree (OARSMT). The router is trained by our proposed combinatorial Monte-Carlo tree search to select a proper set of Steiner points for OARSMT with only one inference. By using a Hanan-grid graph as the input and a 3D U-Net as the network architecture, the router can handle layouts with any dimensions and any routing costs between grids. The experiments on both random cases and public benchmarks demonstrate that our router can significantly outperform previous algorithmic routers and other RL routers using Alpha-Go-like or PPO-based training.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的强化学习训练路由器，用于构建多层避障直线斯坦纳最小树（OARSMT）。路由器通过我们提出的组合蒙特卡罗树搜索进行训练，只需一个推理即可为 OARSMT 选择一组合适的 Steiner 点。通过使用 Hanan 网格图作为输入并使用 3D U-Net 作为网络架构，路由器可以处理任何尺寸的布局以及网格之间的任何路由成本。随机案例和公共基准的实验表明，我们的路由器可以显着优于以前的算法路由器和其他使用类似 Alpha-Go 或基于 PPO 的训练的 RL 路由器。

papers.title: Architectural Whispers: Robust Machine Learning Models Fingerprinting via Frequency Throttling Side-Channels.
papers.abstract: Machine Learning (ML) security practices include hiding ML model architectures to protect intellectual property and prevent attacks. We introduce a novel fingerprinting attack using frequency throttling-based Side-Channel Attack (SCA) to detect an ML model's architecture family by converting power side-channel data into timing variations. This method involves using adversary kernels and a time series ML classifier to discern the architecture from execution time patterns during model operation. We achieved up to 96% accuracy in identifying known ML models' architecture families under Ring 0 privileges and we demonstrated its effectiveness across different platforms. Moreover, our code is publicly available 1.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 安全实践包括隐藏 ML 模型架构以保护知识产权并防止攻击。我们引入了一种新颖的指纹识别攻击，使用基于频率限制的侧通道攻击 (SCA)，通过将功率侧通道数据转换为时序变化来检测 ML 模型的架构系列。该方法涉及使用对手内核和时间序列 ML 分类器来从模型操作期间的执行时间模式中辨别架构。我们在 Ring 0 权限下识别已知 ML 模型架构系列的准确率高达 96%，并且在不同平台上展示了​​其有效性。此外，我们的代码是公开的1。

papers.title: Artisan: Automated Operational Amplifier Design via Domain-specific Large Language Model.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Artisan, an automated operational amplifier design framework using large language models (LLMs). We develop a bidirectional representation to align abstract circuit topologies with their structural and functional semantics. We further employ Tree-of-Thoughts and Chain-of-Thoughts approaches to model the design process as a hierarchical question-answer sequence, implemented by a mechanism of multi-agent interaction. A high-quality opamp dataset is developed to enhance the design proficiency of the Artisan-LLM. Experimental results demonstrate that Artisan outperforms state-of-the-art optimization-based methods and benchmark LLMs, in success rate, circuit performance metrics, and interpretability, while accelerating the design process by up to 50.1X. Artisan will be released for public access.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Artisan，一种使用大语言模型 (LLM) 的自动化运算放大器设计框架。我们开发了一种双向表示，以使抽象电路拓扑与其结构和功能语义保持一致。我们进一步采用思想树和思想链方法将设计过程建模为分层问答序列，并通过多智能体交互机制实现。开发了高质量的运算放大器数据集，以提高 Artisan-LLM 的设计熟练程度。实验结果表明，Artisan 在成功率、电路性能指标和可解释性方面优于最先进的基于优化的方法和基准法学硕士，同时将设计过程加速高达 50.1 倍。 Artisan 将发布供公众访问。

papers.title: Auto-ISP: An Efficient Real-Time Automatic Hyperparameter Optimization Framework for ISP Hardware System.
papers.abstract: Image Signal Processor (ISP) is widely used in intelligent edge devices across various scenarios. The intricate and time-consuming tuning process demands substantial expertise. Current AI-based auto-tuning operates discretely offline, relying on predefined scenes with human intervention, leading to inconvenient manipulation, with potentially fatal impacts on downstream tasks in unforeseen scenes. We propose a real-time automatic hyperparameter optimization ISP hardware system to address real-world scenarios. Our design features a tri-step framework and a hardware accelerator, demonstrating superior performance in human and computer vision tasks, even in real-time unforeseen scenes. Experiments showcase its practicality, achieving 1080P@75FPS/240FPS in FPGA/ASIC, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 图像信号处理器（ISP）广泛应用于各种场景的智能边缘设备。复杂且耗时的调整过程需要大量的专业知识。目前基于人工智能的自动调优都是离线离线运行，依赖于预定义的场景并进行人工干预，导致操作不方便，在不可预见的场景下对下游任务可能产生致命影响。我们提出了一种实时自动超参数优化 ISP 硬件系统来解决现实场景。我们的设计采用三步框架和硬件加速器，即使在实时不可预见的场景中，也能在人类和计算机视觉任务中展现出卓越的性能。实验验证了其实用性，在FPGA/ASIC上分别实现了1080P@75FPS/240FPS。

papers.title: Balloon-ZNS: Constructing High-Capacity and Low-Cost ZNS SSDs with Built-in Compression.
papers.abstract: ZNS SSDs are emerging storage devices promising low cost, high performance, and software definability. This paper proposes Balloon-ZNS that enables transparent compression in ZNS SSDs to enhance cost efficiency. ZNS SSDs, unlike traditional SSDs, require data pages to be stored in logical zones and flash blocks with aligned offsets, conflicting with the management of compressed, variable-length pages. Motivated by a key observation that compressibility locality widely exists in data streams, Balloon-ZNS employs a compressibility-adaptive, slot-aligned storage management scheme to address the intractable conflict. Evaluation with RocksDB shows Balloon-ZNS can reap more than 80% of the compression gain while achieving 7.3% lower to 14.4% higher throughput than a vanilla ZNS SSD, on average, when data compressibility is not poor.
papers.abstract_zh: ZNS SSD 是新兴的存储设备，有望实现低成本、高性能和软件可定义性。本文提出了 Balloon-ZNS，它可以在 ZNS SSD 中实现透明压缩，以提高成本效率。 ZNS SSD 与传统 SSD 不同，需要将数据页存储在偏移量对齐的逻辑区和闪存块中，这与压缩、可变长度页的管理相冲突。受数据流中广泛存在可压缩性局部性这一关键观察的启发，Balloon-ZNS 采用可压缩性自适应、槽对齐的存储管理方案来解决棘手的冲突。 RocksDB 的评估表明，当数据压缩率不差时，Balloon-ZNS 可以获得超过 80% 的压缩增益，同时吞吐量比普通 ZNS SSD 低 7.3% 到 14.4%。

papers.title: Beyond Conventional Defenses: Proactive and Adversarial-Resilient Hardware Malware Detection using Deep Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: This research investigates the vulnerability of machine learning-enabled Hardware Malware Detection (HMD) methods to adversarial attacks, a pressing concern undermining their efficacy against malware threats. While prior adversarial learning research primarily centered on image classification and/or overlooked adversarial attacks in HMDs, we delve into the distinctive challenges posed by adversarial attacks in the context of tabular data from processors' performance counters. This paper introduces a proactive and robust multi-phased adversarial learning and defense framework based on Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL). In the initial phase, highly effective adversarial attacks are employed to circumvent ML-based detection mechanisms. Subsequently, an efficient deep reinforcement learning technique based on Advantage Actor Critic (A2C) is presented to predict adversarial attack patterns in realtime. Next, ML models are fortified through adversarial training to enhance their defense capabilities against both malware and adversarial attacks. To achieve greater efficiency, an RL-based constraint controller using an Upper Confidence Bounds (UCB) algorithm is proposed that dynamically assigns adversarial defense responsibilities to specialized RL agents based on different performance constraints. The results demonstrate the proposed framework's effectiveness, indicating up to 86% boost in F1-score for defending against adversarial attacks across all models, leading to detection rate of 96.1% for the top-performing adaptive malware detector.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项研究调查了支持机器学习的硬件恶意软件检测 (HMD) 方法对对抗性攻击的脆弱性，这是一个紧迫的问题，削弱了它们抵御恶意软件威胁的功效。虽然之前的对抗性学习研究主要集中在图像分类和/或被忽视的 HMD 中的对抗性攻击，但我们深入研究了在处理器性能计数器的表格数据背景下对抗性攻击所带来的独特挑战。本文介绍了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的主动且鲁棒的多阶段对抗学习和防御框架。在初始阶段，采用高效的对抗性攻击来规避基于机器学习的检测机制。随后，提出了一种基于优势参与者评论家（A2C）的高效深度强化学习技术来实时预测对抗性攻击模式。接下来，机器学习模型通过对抗性训练得到强化，以增强其针对恶意软件和对抗性攻击的防御能力。为了实现更高的效率，提出了一种使用上置信界（UCB）算法的基于强化学习的约束控制器，该算法根据不同的性能约束动态地将对抗性防御责任分配给专门的强化学习代理。结果证明了所提出的框架的有效性，表明所有模型中防御对抗性攻击的 F1 分数提高了 86%，从而使性能最佳的自适应恶意软件检测器的检测率达到 96.1%。

papers.title: Beyond Inference: Performance Analysis of DNN Server Overheads for Computer Vision.
papers.abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) inference has become an important part of many data-center workloads. This has prompted focused efforts to design ever-faster deep learning accelerators such as GPUs and TPUs. However, an end-to-end DNN-based vision application contains more than just DNN inference, including input decompression, resizing, sampling, normalization, and data transfer. In this paper, we perform a thorough evaluation of computer vision inference requests performed on a throughput-optimized serving system. We quantify the performance impact of server overheads such as data movement, preprocessing, and message brokers between two DNNs producing outputs at different rates. Our empirical analysis encompasses many computer vision tasks including image classification, segmentation, detection, depth-estimation, and more complex processing pipelines with multiple DNNs. Our results consistently demonstrate that end-to-end application performance can easily be dominated by data processing and data movement functions (up to 56% of end-to-end latency in a medium-sized image, and ~ 80% impact on system throughput in a large image), even though these functions have been conventionally overlooked in deep learning system design. Our work identifies important performance bottlenecks in different application scenarios, achieves 2.25× better throughput compared to prior work, and paves the way for more holistic deep learning system design.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理已成为许多数据中心工作负载的重要组成部分。这促使人们集中精力设计更快的深度学习加速器，例如 GPU 和 TPU。然而，基于端到端 DNN 的视觉应用程序不仅仅包含 DNN 推理，还包括输入解压缩、调整大小、采样、归一化和数据传输。在本文中，我们对在吞吐量优化的服务系统上执行的计算机视觉推理请求进行了彻底的评估。我们量化了服务器开销（例如以不同速率生成输出的两个 DNN 之间的数据移动、预处理和消息代理）对性能的影响。我们的实证分析涵盖许多计算机视觉任务，包括图像分类、分割、检测、深度估计以及具有多个 DNN 的更复杂的处理流程。我们的结果一致表明，端到端应用程序性能很容易受到数据处理和数据移动功能的支配（在中型图像中，端到端延迟高达 56%，在大型图像中，对系统吞吐量的影响约为 80%），尽管这些功能在深度学习系统设计中通常被忽视。我们的工作确定了不同应用场景中的重要性能瓶颈，与之前的工作相比，吞吐量提高了 2.25 倍，并为更全面的深度学习系统设计铺平了道路。

papers.title: Binding Multi-bit Flip-flop Cells through Design and Technology Co-optimization.
papers.abstract: Though using multi-bit flip-flop (MBFF) cells provide the benefit of saving dynamic power, its big cell size with many D/Q-pins inherently entails two critical limitations, which are (1) the loss of full flexibility in optimizing the wires connecting to the D/Q-pins in MBFFs and (2) the loss of selectively resizing i.e., controlling the driving strength of internal flip-flops in MBFFs to optimize timing. In this work, we propose a comprehensive solution to resolving those limitations through design and technology co-optimization (DTCO) in physical design flow. Specifically, to address limitation 1, given an input circuit with MBFF allocation and binding, at the post-placement stage we explore diverse layouts of MBFF cells with various D/Q-pin locations and rebind MBFF instances in the circuit to the MBFF cells that are the most suitable for minimizing the wirelength connecting D/Q-pins. Meanwhile, to address limitation 2, at the post-route stage we explore MBFF cell layouts of non-rectangle, precisely, L- and T-shape to control the driving strength of internal flip-flops selectively, by which we rebind MBFF instances with negative slack to the area-minimal rectangle or non-rectangle MBFF cells to optimize timing while increasing the power overhead minimally. Through experiments with benchmark circuits, it is shown that our DTCO driven MBFF rebinding method is able to produce the circuit implementations with 1.42% less wirelength in comparison with that produced by the state-of-the-art commercial EDA tool using MBFFs.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然使用多位触发器 (MBFF) 单元具有节省动态功耗的优点，但其具有许多 D/Q 引脚的大单元尺寸本质上会带来两个关键限制，即 (1) 在优化连接到 MBFF 中的 D/Q 引脚的导线时失去了充分的灵活性，以及​​ (2) 失去了选择性调整大小的能力，即控制 MBFF 中内部触发器的驱动强度以优化时序。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种全面的解决方案，通过物理设计流程中的设计和技术协同优化（DTCO）来解决这些限制。具体来说，为了解决限制 1，给定具有 MBFF 分配和绑定的输入电路，在布局后阶段，我们探索具有各种 D/Q 引脚位置的 MBFF 单元的不同布局，并将电路中的 MBFF 实例重新绑定到最适合最小化连接 D/Q 引脚的线长的 MBFF 单元。同时，为了解决限制2，在后布线阶段，我们探索非矩形、精确地说、L形和T形的MBFF单元布局，以选择性地控制内部触发器的驱动强度，通过这种方式，我们将具有负裕度的MBFF实例重新绑定到面积最小的矩形或非矩形MBFF单元，以优化时序，同时最大限度地增加功率开销。通过基准电路的实验表明，与使用 MBFF 的最先进的商业 EDA 工具生成的电路相比，我们的 DTCO 驱动的 MBFF 重新绑定方法能够生成线长减少 1.42% 的电路实现。

papers.title: Bitwise Adaptive Early Termination in Hyperdimensional Computing Inference.
papers.abstract: Hyperdimensional computing (HDC), a powerful paradigm for cognitive tasks, often demands hypervectors of high dimensions (e.g., 10,000) to achieve competitive accuracy. However, processing such large-dimensional data poses challenges for performance and energy efficiency, particularly on resource-constrained devices. In this paper, We present a framework to terminate bit-serial HDC inference early when sufficient confidence is attained in the prediction. This approach integrates a Naive Bayes model to replace the conventional associative memory in HDC. This transformation allows for a probabilistic interpretation of the model outputs, steering away from mere similarity measures. We reduce more than 70% of bits that need to be processed while maintaining comparable accuracy across diverse benchmarks. In addition, We show the adaptability of our early termination algorithm during on-the-fly learning scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 超维计算 (HDC) 是认知任务的强大范例，通常需要高维度（例如 10,000）的超向量才能实现有竞争力的准确性。然而，处理如此大维的数据对性能和能源效率提出了挑战，特别是在资源受限的设备上。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架，用于在预测获得足够的置信度时尽早终止位串行 HDC 推理。该方法集成了朴素贝叶斯模型来取代 HDC 中的传统联想记忆。这种转换允许对模型输出进行概率解释，而不是单纯的相似性度量。我们减少了超过 70% 的需要处理的位数，同时在不同的基准测试中保持相当的精度。此外，我们还展示了提前终止算法在动态学习场景中的适应性。

papers.title: BNN-YEO: an efficient Bayesian Neural Network for yield estimation and optimization.
papers.abstract: Yield estimation and optimization is ubiquitous in modern circuit design but remains elusive for large-scale chips. This is largely due to the mounting cost of transistor-level simulation and one's often limited resources. In this study, we propose a novel framework to estimate and optimize yield using Bayesian Neural Network (BNN-YEO). By coupling machine learning method with Bayesian network, our approach can effectively integrate prior knowledge and is unaffected by the overfitting problem prevalent in most surrogate models. With the introduction of a smooth approximation of the indicator function, it incorporates gradient information to facilitate global yield optimization. We examine its effectiveness via numerical experiments on 6T SRAM and found that BNN-YEO provides 100x speedup (in terms of SPICE simulations) over standard Monte Carlo in yield estimation, and 20x faster than the state-of-the-art method for total yield estimation and optimization with improved accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 良率估计和优化在现代电路设计中无处不在，但对于大规模芯片来说仍然难以捉摸。这主要是由于晶体管级仿真的安装成本以及资源通常有限。在本研究中，我们提出了一种使用贝叶斯神经网络（BNN-YEO）来估计和优化产量的新颖框架。通过将机器学习方法与贝叶斯网络相结合，我们的方法可以有效地整合先验知识，并且不受大多数​​代理模型中普遍存在的过度拟合问题的影响。通过引入指标函数的平滑逼近，它结合了梯度信息以促进全局良率优化。我们通过 6T SRAM 上的数值实验检验了其有效性，发现 BNN-YEO 在良率估计方面比标准蒙特卡罗提供了 100 倍的加速（就 SPICE 模拟而言），并且在总良率估计和优化方面比最先进的方法快 20 倍，并且精度更高。

papers.title: Boolean Matching Reversible Circuits: Algorithm and Complexity.
papers.abstract: Boolean matching is an important problem in logic synthesis and verification. Despite being well-studied for conventional Boolean circuits, its treatment for reversible logic circuits remains largely, if not completely, missing. This work provides the first such study. Given two (black-box) reversible logic circuits that are promised to be matchable, we check their equivalences under various input/output negation and permutation conditions subject to the availability/unavailability of their inverse circuits. Notably, among other results, we show that the equivalence up to input negation and permutation is solvable in quantum polynomial time, while its classical complexity is exponential. This result is arguably the first demonstration of quantum exponential speedup in solving design automation problems. Also, as a negative result, we show that the equivalence up to both input and output negations is not solvable in quantum polynomial time unless UNIQUE-SAT is, which is unlikely. This work paves the theoretical foundation of Boolean matching reversible circuits for potential applications, e.g., in quantum circuit synthesis.
papers.abstract_zh: 布尔匹配是逻辑综合和验证中的一个重要问题。尽管对传统布尔电路进行了充分研究，但它对可逆逻辑电路的处理仍然在很大程度上（如果不是完全）缺失。这项工作提供了第一个此类研究。给定两个有望匹配的（黑盒）可逆逻辑电路，我们根据其逆电路的可用性/不可用性，在各种输入/输出否定和排列条件下检查它们的等价性。值得注意的是，除其他结果外，我们表明输入否定和排列的等价性在量子多项式时间内是可解的，而其经典复杂度是指数级的。这一结果可以说是解决设计自动化问题中量子指数加速的首次证明。此外，作为一个否定的结果，我们表明输入和输出否定的等价性在量子多项式时间内是不可解的，除非 UNIQUE-SAT 是可解的，但这是不可能的。这项工作为布尔匹配可逆电路的潜在应用（例如量子电路合成）奠定了理论基础。

papers.title: C-Nash: A Novel Ferroelectric Computing-in-Memory Architecture for Solving Mixed Strategy Nash Equilibrium.
papers.abstract: The concept of Nash equilibrium (NE), pivotal within game theory, has garnered widespread attention across numerous industries. However, verifying the existence of NE poses a significant computational challenge, classified as an NP-complete problem. Recent advancements introduced several quantum Nash solvers aimed at identifying pure strategy NE solutions (i.e., binary solutions) by integrating slack terms into the objective function, commonly referred to as slack-quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (S-QUBO). However, incorporation of slack terms into the quadratic optimization results in changes of the objective function, which may cause incorrect solutions. Furthermore, these quantum solvers only identify a limited subset of pure strategy NE solutions, and fail to address mixed strategy NE (i.e., decimal solutions), leaving many solutions undiscovered. In this work, we propose C-Nash, a novel ferroelectric computing-in-memory (CiM) architecture that can efficiently handle both pure and mixed strategy NE solutions. The proposed architecture consists of (i) a transformation method that converts quadratic optimization into a MAX-QUBO form without introducing additional slack variables, thereby avoiding objective function changes; (ii) a ferroelectric FET (FeFET) based bi-crossbar structure for storing payoff matrices and accelerating the core vector-matrix-vector (VMV) multiplications of QUBO form; (iii) A winner-takes-all (WTA) tree implementing the MAX form and a two-phase based simulated annealing (SA) logic for searching NE solutions. Evaluations show that C-Nash has up to 68.6% increase in the success rate for identifying NE solutions, finding all pure and mixed NE solutions rather than only a portion of pure NE solutions, compared to D-Wave based quantum approaches. Moreover, C-Nash boasts a reduction up to 157.9X/79.0X in time-to-solutions compared to D-Wave 2000 Q6 and D-Wave Advantage 4.1, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 纳什均衡（NE）的概念在博弈论中至关重要，已经引起了众多行业的广泛关注。然而，验证 NE 的存在提出了重大的计算挑战，被归类为 NP 完全问题。最近的进展引入了几种量子纳什求解器，旨在通过将松弛项集成到目标函数中来识别纯策略 NE 解决方案（即二元解决方案），通常称为松弛二次无约束二元优化（S-QUBO）。然而，将松弛项纳入二次优化会导致目标函数发生变化，从而可能导致解不正确。此外，这些量子求解器仅识别纯策略 NE 解的有限子集，而无法解决混合策略 NE（即十进制解），从而导致许多解未被发现。在这项工作中，我们提出了 C-Nash，一种新颖的铁电内存计算 (CiM) 架构，可以有效地处理纯策略 NE 解决方案和混合策略 NE 解决方案。所提出的架构包括（i）一种变换方法，将二次优化转换为 MAX-QUBO 形式，无需引入额外的松弛变量，从而避免目标函数的变化； (ii) 基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 的双交叉结构，用于存储支付矩阵并加速 QUBO 形式的核心向量-矩阵-向量 (VMV) 乘法； (iii) 实现 MAX 形式的赢者通吃 (WTA) 树和用于搜索 NE 解的基于两阶段的模拟退火 (SA) 逻辑。评估表明，与基于 D-Wave 的量子方法相比，C-Nash 识别 NE 解的成功率提高了 68.6%，找到了所有纯 NE 解和混合 NE 解，而不是仅部分纯 NE 解。此外，与 D-Wave 2000 Q6 和 D-Wave Advantage 4.1 相比，C-Nash 的解决方案时间分别缩短了 157.9 倍/79.0 倍。

papers.title: Cache-aware Task Decomposition for Efficient Intermittent Computing Systems.
papers.abstract: Energy harvesting offers a scalable and cost-effective power solution for IoT devices, but it introduces the challenge of frequent and unpredictable power failures due to the unstable environment. To address this, intermittent computing has been proposed, which periodically backs up the system state to non-volatile memory (NVM), enabling robust and sustainable computing even in the face of unreliable power supplies. In modern processors, write back cache is extensively utilized to enhance system performance. However, it poses a challenge during backup operations as it buffers updates to memory, potentially leading to inconsistent system states. One solution is to adopt a write-through cache, which avoids the inconsistency issue but incurs increased memory access latency for each write reference. Some existing work enforces a cache flushing before backups to maintain a consistent system state, resulting in significant backup overhead. In this paper, we point out that although cache delays updates to the main memory, it may preserve a recoverable system state in the main memory. Leveraging this characteristic, we propose a cache-aware task decomposition method that divides an application into multiple tasks, ensuring that no dirty cache lines are evicted during their execution. Furthermore, the cache-aware task decomposition maintains an unchanged memory state during the execution of each task, enabling us to parallelize the backup process with task execution and effectively hide the backup latency. Experimental results with different power traces demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed system.
papers.abstract_zh: 能量收集为物联网设备提供了可扩展且经济高效的电源解决方案，但它带来了由于环境不稳定而导致频繁且不可预测的电源故障的挑战。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了间歇计算，它定期将系统状态备份到非易失性存储器（NVM），即使在电源不可靠的情况下也能实现稳健且可持续的计算。在现代处理器中，广泛利用回写式缓存来增强系统性能。然而，它在备份操作期间带来了挑战，因为它缓冲内存更新，可能导致系统状态不一致。一种解决方案是采用直写式缓存，这可以避免不一致问题，但会增加每次写入引用的内存访问延迟。一些现有的工作在备份之前强制刷新缓存以保持一致的系统状态，从而导致大量的备份开销。在本文中，我们指出，虽然缓存延迟了对主存的更新，但它可以在主存中保留可恢复的系统状态。利用这一特性，我们提出了一种缓存感知任务分解方法，将应用程序划分为多个任务，确保在执行过程中不会驱逐脏缓存行。此外，缓存感知任务分解在每个任务执行期间保持内存状态不变，使我们能够将备份过程与任务执行并行化，并有效隐藏备份延迟。不同功率轨迹的实验结果证明了所提出系统的有效性。

papers.title: CAMO: Correlation-Aware Mask Optimization with Modulated Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Optical proximity correction (OPC) is a vital step to ensure print-ability in modern VLSI manufacturing. Various OPC approaches based on machine learning have been proposed to pursue performance and efficiency, which are typically data-driven and hardly involve any particular considerations of the OPC problem, leading to potential performance or efficiency bottlenecks. In this paper, we propose CAMO, a reinforcement learning-based OPC system that specifically integrates important principles of the OPC problem. CAMO explicitly involves the spatial correlation among the movements of neighboring segments and an OPC-inspired modulation for movement action selection. Experiments are conducted on both via layer patterns and metal layer patterns. The results demonstrate that CAMO outperforms state-of-the-art OPC engines from both academia and industry.
papers.abstract_zh: 光学邻近校正 (OPC) 是确保现代 VLSI 制造中可打印性的重要步骤。人们提出了各种基于机器学习的OPC方法来追求性能和效率，这些方法通常是数据驱动的，几乎不涉及OPC问题的任何特定考虑，从而导致潜在的性能或效率瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了 CAMO，一种基于强化学习的 OPC 系统，专门集成了 OPC 问题的重要原理。 CAMO 明确涉及相邻片段运动之间的空间相关性以及 OPC 启发的运动动作选择调制。对通孔层图案和金属层图案都进行了实验。结果表明，CAMO 的性能优于学术界和工业界最先进的 OPC 引擎。

papers.title: CAMPER: Exploring the Potential of Content Addressable Memory for 3D Point Cloud Efficient Range Search.
CAP: A General Purpose Computation-in-memory with Content Addressable Processing Paradigm.
papers.abstract: Demands for efficient computing under memory wall have led to computation-in-memory (CIM) accelerators that leverage memory structure to perform in-situ computing. The content addressable memory (CAM) processing is a CIM paradigm that accomplishes general purpose functions, via sequences of search and update operations on CAM. However, the conventional CAM-based CIM is customized for vector-vector operation only and requires long search-update iterations for computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 对内存墙下高效计算的需求催生了利用内存结构执行原位计算的内存计算（CIM）加速器。内容可寻址存储器 (CAM) 处理是一种 CIM 范例，它通过 CAM 上的搜索和更新操作序列来完成通用功能。然而，传统的基于CAM的CIM仅针对向量-向量运算而定制，并且需要长时间的搜索更新迭代来进行计算。

papers.title: CDA-GNN: A Chain-driven Accelerator for Efficient Asynchronous Graph Neural Network.
papers.abstract: Asynchronous Graph Neural Network (AGNN) has attracted much research attention because it enables faster convergence speed than the synchronous GNN. However, existing software/hardware solutions suffer from redundant computation overhead and excessive off-chip communications for AGNN due to irregular state propagations along the dependency chains between vertices. This paper proposes a chain-driven asynchronous accelerator, CDA-GNN, for efficient AGNN inference. Specifically, CDA-GNN proposes a chain-driven asynchronous execution approach into novel accelerator design to regularize the vertex state propagations for fewer redundant computations and off-chip communications and also designs a chain-aware data caching method to improve data locality for AGNN. We have implemented and evaluated CDA-GNN on a Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA card. Compared with the cutting-edge software solutions (i.e., Dorylus and AMP) and hardware solutions (i.e., BlockGNN and FlowGNN), CDA-GNN improves the performance of AGNN inference by an average of 1,173x, 182.4x, 10.2x, and 7.9x and saves energy by 2,241x, 242.2x, 12.4x, and 8.9x, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 异步图神经网络（AGNN）因其比同步 GNN 更快的收敛速度而引起了广泛的研究关注。然而，由于沿着顶点之间的依赖链的不规则状态传播，现有的软件/硬件解决方案面临冗余计算开销和过多的 AGNN 片外通信。本文提出了一种链驱动的异步加速器 CDA-GNN，用于高效的 AGNN 推理。具体来说，CDA-GNN 在新颖的加速器设计中提出了一种链驱动的异步执行方法，以规范顶点状态传播，以减少冗余计算和片外通信，并设计一种链感知数据缓存方法来提高 AGNN 的数据局部性。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 卡上实现并评估了 CDA-GNN。与前沿的软件解决方案（Dorylus、AMP）和硬件解决方案（BlockGNN、FlowGNN）相比，CDA-GNN 将 AGNN 推理性能平均提升 1,173 倍、182.4 倍、10.2 倍、7.9 倍，节能 2,241 倍、242.2 倍、12.4 倍和分别为 8.9 倍。

papers.title: CDLS: Constraint Driven Generative AI Framework for Analog Layout Synthesis.
papers.abstract: In advanced process technology nodes, analog circuit performance is intrinsically linked to layout parasitics and layout dependent effects (LDE). In contrast to digital designs, layout generation for analog mixed signal circuits remains predominantly a slow manual task, impeding rapid design convergence. To address this bottleneck, we introduce CDLS - a Constraint Driven Generative AI Framework for Analog Layout Synthesis. CDLS is fundamentally a constraint driven framework that enables analog circuit designers to auto-generate simulation-ready layout. Unlike traditional algorithmic approaches, CDLS uses generative AI and machine learning techniques to generate key design constraints that drive the quality of autogenerated placement and routing. Using CDLS, on average we reduce layout iteration time by 2-3X on industrial designs. By reducing the turn-around-time on layout iterations we estimate a 30% reduction to overall design convergence cycle. We also demonstrate that the quality of results achieved through CDLS is on par with manually drawn layout on state-of-the-art analog designs developed on an Intel sub-10nm process technology node.
papers.abstract_zh: 在先进工艺技术节点中，模拟电路性能与布局寄生效应和布局相关效应 (LDE) 有着内在的联系。与数字设计相比，模拟混合信号电路的布局生成仍然主要是一项缓慢的手动任务，阻碍了设计的快速收敛。为了解决这个瓶颈，我们引入了 CDLS——一种用于模拟布局综合的约束驱动生成人工智能框架。 CDLS 从根本上来说是一个约束驱动框架，使模拟电路设计人员能够自动生成可用于仿真的布局。与传统算法方法不同，CDLS 使用生成式人工智能和机器学习技术来生成关键设计约束，从而提高自动生成布局和布线的质量。使用 CDLS，我们将工业设计的布局迭代时间平均减少了 2-3 倍。通过减少布局迭代的周转时间，我们估计总体设计收敛周期将减少 30%。我们还证明，通过 CDLS 实现的结果质量与在英特尔 10 纳米以下工艺技术节点上开发的最先进模拟设计上手动绘制的布局相当。

papers.title: CDS: An Anti-Aging Calibratable Digital Sensor for Detecting Multiple Types of Fault Injection Attacks.
papers.abstract: Fault injection attacks (FIAs) are a class of active physical attacks that inject faults into computing devices to deliberately change their intended behaviors for malicious purposes such as security feature circumvention, privilege escalation, secret data extraction by analyzing the erroneous outputs, etc. Existing sensors that detect fault injection attacks are either susceptible to aging or suffer from complicated and costly calibration process. Worse still, most sensors will fail in the presence of dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) because they are built upon fixed delay chains and cannot adapt to operating voltage and frequency variations. In this paper, we overcome these limitations by presenting CDS, a delay chain based digital sensor that exploits timing variations of both detector and protected object for detecting multiple types of fault injection attacks. CDS utilizes a calibration module to solve the accuracy degradation caused by aging phenomena and a dynamic adjustment module to acclimatize itself to the need of dynamically adjusting voltage according to operating frequency in the presence of DVFS. To demonstrate its capability, we use CDS to protect the hardware accelerator of PRESENT cryptographic algorithm against voltage and laser glitching attacks. Simulation results based on HSPICE show that (i) CDS can detect 100% of voltage and temperature coordinated glitching attacks with 4.1% early warning; (ii) CDS can detect 100% of laser glitching attacks with 9.1% early warning; (iii) CDS maintains outstanding aging resistance with only 1.1% false alarm rate increase after 7 years of use.
papers.abstract_zh: 故障注入攻击（FIA）是一类主动物理攻击，它将故障注入计算设备中，故意改变其预期行为，以达到恶意目的，例如安全功能规避、权限升级、通过分析错误输出提取秘密数据等。检测故障注入攻击的现有传感器要么容易老化，要么需要经历复杂且昂贵的校准过程。更糟糕的是，大多数传感器在动态电压和频率缩放 (DVFS) 的情况下都会失败，因为它们是建立在固定延迟链上的，无法适应工作电压和频率变化。在本文中，我们通过提出 CDS 克服了这些限制，CDS 是一种基于延迟链的数字传感器，它利用检测器和受保护对象的时序变化来检测多种类型的故障注入攻击。 CDS利用校准模块来解决老化现象引起的精度下降，并利用动态调整模块来适应DVFS存在下根据工作频率动态调整电压的需要。为了展示其功能，我们使用 CDS 来保护 PRESENT 加密算法的硬件加速器免受电压和激光毛刺攻击。基于HSPICE的仿真结果表明：（i）CDS可以100%检测到电压和温度协调的毛刺攻击，预警率为4.1%； (ii) CDS 可以 100% 检测激光故障攻击，预警率为 9.1%； (iii) CDS保持出色的抗老化性能，使用7年后误报率仅增加1.1%。

papers.title: CEDAR: Computing-in-pixel Edge-aware Detection and Reconstruction Architecture for High-resolution 3D Imaging.
papers.abstract: Large-format single-photon avalanche diode (SPAD)-based direct time of flight (dToF) sensors are expected to be widely applied in future L5 full driving automation. However, the high-power in-pixel TDCs and the huge amount of data generated by multiframe histogram sampling impose limitations on the pixel format of SPAD-based dToF sensors. To tackle this challenge, we proposed the Computing-in-pixel Edge-aware Detection and Reconstruction (CEDAR) architecture. In this architecture, edge pixels are recognized by charge-domain convolution (CDC) computing, and noise pixels are eliminated by in-memory denoising (IMD). Only few TDCs in these edge pixels are activated, resulting in significant power and data savings. Afterward, the full-format image is reconstructed by a U-Net using the obtained depth information from these edge pixels. For the first time, we proposed a high-resolution 512 × 512 SPAD-based dToF sensor with a low power of 83.3 mW, a distance accuracy of 0.9 cm, and a frame rate of 60 fps. The high-resolution 3D image can be reconstructed by only 3.5% sparse edge pixels, achieving a PSNR of 35.2 dB. The CEDAR architecture can achieve 16× pixel format and image resolution improvement under the same constraint of power dissipation.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于大尺寸单光子雪崩二极管（SPAD）的直接飞行时间（dToF）传感器有望在未来L5级全驾驶自动化中得到广泛应用。然而，高功率像素内 TDC 和多帧直方图采样生成的大量数据对基于 SPAD 的 dToF 传感器的像素格式造成了限制。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了像素计算边缘感知检测和重建（CEDAR）架构。在该架构中，边缘像素通过电荷域卷积（CDC）计算来识别，噪声像素通过内存去噪（IMD）来消除。这些边缘像素中只有少数 TDC 被激活，从而显着节省功耗和数据。随后，U-Net 使用从这些边缘像素获得的深度信息重建全格式图像。我们首次提出了一种基于 SPAD 的高分辨率 512 × 512 dToF 传感器，具有 83.3 mW 的低功耗、0.9 cm 的距离精度和 60 fps 的帧速率。仅用3.5%的稀疏边缘像素即可重建高分辨率3D图像，实现35.2 dB的PSNR。 CEDAR架构可以在相同功耗约束下实现16×像素格式和图像分辨率提升。

papers.title: CFTCG: Test Case Generation for Simulink Model through Code Based Fuzzing.
papers.abstract: Simulink is extensively utilized in system design for its ability to facilitate modeling and synthesis of embedded controllers. It provides automatic test case generation to assist testers in inspecting the model. However, with the continuous increase in the model's scale, the control logic and internal states of the model are becoming more and more complex. Mainstream test case generation methods based on constraint solving and model simulation face challenges in achieving high coverage metrics.
papers.abstract_zh: Simulink 因其能够促进嵌入式控制器的建模和综合而在系统设计中得到广泛应用。它提供自动测试用例生成来帮助测试人员检查模型。然而，随着模型规模的不断增大，模型的控制逻辑和内部状态变得越来越复杂。基于约束求解和模型模拟的主流测试用例生成方法在实现高覆盖率指标方面面临挑战。

papers.title: ChatCPU: An Agile CPU Design and Verification Platform with LLM.
papers.abstract: The increasing complexity of semiconductor designs necessitates agile hardware development methodologies to keep pace with rapid technological advancements.
