papers.abstract_zh: 智能网络接口卡 (SmartNIC) 推动的内存分解已成为共享数据中心内存资源的一种经济高效的方法。然而，当前基于SoC的SmartNIC在有效支持分解内存（DM）系统中的近数据处理（NDP）方面面临着一些挑战，例如NDP中使用的SmartNIC的资源分配效率低下，以及数据节点上的SmartNIC与计算节点上的CPU之间缺乏协作。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 TIGA，这是一种用于基于 SmartNIC 的分解内存系统的高效 NDP 框架。我们提出了一种自适应资源分配器来自动充分利用 NDP 引擎之间的 SoC 内核，以及一种 SmartNIC-CPU 协作计算机制来调度 CPU 和 SmartNIC 之间的 NDP 任务。我们使用 FPGA 制作 TIGA 原型，并使用几种典型工作负载对其进行评估。实验结果表明，与最先进的基于 SmartNIC 的协处理方案相比，TIGA 显着提高了 DM 系统中 NDP 任务的效率。

papers.title: TITAN: A Fast and Distributed Large-Scale Trapped-Ion NISQ Computer.
papers.abstract: Trapped-Ion (TI) technology offers potential breakthroughs for Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum (NISQ) computing. TI qubits offer extended coherence times and high gate fidelity, making them appealing for large-scale NISQ computers. Constructing such computers demands a distributed architecture connecting Quantum Charge Coupled Devices (QCCDs) via quantum matter-links and photonic switches. However, current distributed TI NISQ computers face hardware and system challenges. Entangling qubits across a photonic switch introduces significant latency, while existing compilers generate suboptimal mappings due to their unawareness of the interconnection topology. In this paper, we introduce TITAN, a large-scale distributed TI NISQ computer, which employs an innovative photonic interconnection design to reduce entanglement latency and an advanced partitioning and mapping algorithm to optimize matter-link communications. Our evaluations show that TITAN greatly enhances quantum application performance by 56.6% and fidelity by 19.7% compared to existing systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 俘获离子 (TI) 技术为噪声中尺度量子 (NISQ) 计算提供了潜在的突破。 TI 量子位提供更长的相干时间和高门保真度，使其对大型 NISQ 计算机具有吸引力。构建此类计算机需要一种分布式架构，通过量子物质链路和光子开关连接量子电荷耦合器件 (QCCD)。然而，当前的分布式 TI NISQ 计算机面临硬件和系统挑战。光子开关上的量子位纠缠会带来显着的延迟，而现有的编译器由于不了解互连拓扑而生成次优映射。在本文中，我们介绍了 TITAN，这是一款大规模分布式 TI NISQ 计算机，它采用创新的光子互连设计来减少纠缠延迟，并采用先进的分区和映射算法来优化物质链接通信。我们的评估表明，与现有系统相比，TITAN 的量子应用性能大幅提升了 56.6%，保真度提升了 19.7%。

papers.title: Token-Picker: Accelerating Attention in Text Generation with Minimized Memory Transfer via Probability Estimation.
papers.abstract: The attention mechanism in text generation is memory-bounded due to its sequential characteristics. Therefore, off-chip memory accesses should be minimized for faster execution. Although previous methods addressed this by pruning unimportant tokens, they fall short in selectively removing tokens with near-zero attention probabilities in each instance. Our method estimates the probability before the softmax function, effectively removing low probability tokens and achieving an 12.1x pruning ratio without fine-tuning. Additionally, we present a hardware design supporting seamless on-demand off-chip access. Our approach shows 2.6x reduced memory accesses, leading to an average 2.3x speedup and a 2.4x energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 文本生成中的注意力机制由于其顺序特征而受到内存限制。因此，应尽量减少片外存储器访问以加快执行速度。尽管以前的方法通过修剪不重要的标记来解决这个问题，但它们在选择性地删除每个实例中注意力概率接近于零的标记方面存在不足。我们的方法在 softmax 函数之前估计概率，有效地去除低概率标记，并在无需微调的情况下实现 12.1 倍的剪枝率。此外，我们还提出了一种支持无缝按需片外访问的硬件设计。我们的方法显示内存访问量减少了 2.6 倍，从而实现平均 2.3 倍的加速和 2.4 倍的能源效率。

papers.title: Top-Level Routing for Multiply-Instantiated Blocks with Topology Hashing.
papers.abstract: Modern System-on-Chip (SoC) design is divided into hierarchical instances using the multiply-instantiated block (MIB) technique to simplify the design process. Top-level routing aims at providing routing prototyping between those instances. It requires consideration of replicated routing paths that can either be utilized for routing or remain as floating segments. Conventional path-searching based algorithm often fails to find a legal solution under such a scenario. To address this, we propose an effective and efficient top-level routing framework for MIBs by hashing the topology of each net and using a group maze routing scheme. Experimental results demonstrate promising performance compared to the winners of the MIB-aware top-level router contest 2022 organized by Synopsys.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代片上系统 (SoC) 设计使用多重实例化块 (MIB) 技术划分为分层实例，以简化设计过程。顶级路由旨在提供这些实例之间的路由原型。它需要考虑复制的路由路径，这些路径可以用于路由或保留为浮动段。在这种情况下，传统的基于路径搜索的算法往往无法找到合法的解决方案。为了解决这个问题，我们通过散列每个网络的拓扑并使用组迷宫路由方案，提出了一种有效且高效的 MIB 顶级路由框架。与 Synopsys 组织的 2022 年 MIB 感知顶级路由器竞赛的获胜者相比，实验结果表明其性能表现出色。

papers.title: Toward Controllable Hierarchical Clock Tree Synthesis with Skew-Latency-Load Tree.
papers.abstract: Clock tree synthesis (CTS) constructs an efficient clock tree, meeting design constraints and minimizing resource usage. It serves as a bridge between placement and routing, facilitating concurrent optimization of multiple design objectives. To construct a clock tree with lower latency and load capacitance while maintaining a specified skew constraint, we introduce skew-latency-load tree (SLLT) which combines the merits of bound skew tree and Steiner shallow-light tree, along with an analysis and demonstration of the boundaries of these two tree types. We propose a method for constructing SLLT, which significantly reduces both the maximum latency and load capacitance compared to previous methods while ensuring skew control. Combining this routing topology generation method, we introduce a hierarchical CTS framework, and it is constructed by integrating partition schemes and buffering optimization techniques. We validate our solution at 28nm process technology, demonstrating superior performance compared to the solutions of OpenROAD and advanced commercial tool. Our approach outperforms in all metrics (max latency, skew, buffer number, clock capacitance), achieving a significant reduction in latency of 29.45% compared to OpenROAD and 6.75% compared to the commercial tool.
papers.abstract_zh: 时钟树综合（CTS）构建高效的时钟树，满足设计约束并最大限度地减少资源使用。它充当布局和布线之间的桥梁，促进多个设计目标的并发优化。为了构建具有较低延迟和负载电容的时钟树，同时保持指定的时滞约束，我们引入了时滞延迟负载树（SLLT），它结合了绑定时滞树和斯坦纳浅光树的优点，并对这两种树类型的边界进行了分析和演示。我们提出了一种构建 SLLT 的方法，与以前的方法相比，该方法显着降低了最大延迟和负载电容，同时确保了偏差控制。结合这种路由拓扑生成方法，我们引入了分层CTS框架，它是通过集成分区方案和缓冲优化技术构建的。我们在 28nm 工艺技术上验证了我们的解决方案，与 OpenROAD 的解决方案和先进的商业工具相比，展示了卓越的性能。我们的方法在所有指标（最大延迟、偏斜、缓冲区数量、时钟电容）方面均表现出色，与 OpenROAD 相比，延迟显着降低了 29.45%，与商业工具相比，延迟显着降低了 6.75%。

papers.title: Toward High-Accuracy, Programmable Extreme-Edge Intelligence for Neuromorphic Vision Sensors utilizing Magnetic Domain Wall Motion-based MTJ.
papers.abstract: The desire to empower resource-limited edge devices with computer vision (CV) must overcome the high energy consumption of collecting and processing vast sensory data. To address the challenge, this work proposes an energy-efficient non-von-Neumann in-pixel processing solution for neuromorphic vision sensors employing emerging (X) magnetic domain wall magnetic tunnel junction (MDWMTJ) for the first time, in conjunction with CMOS-based neuromorphic pixels. Our hybrid CMOS+X approach performs in-situ massively parallel asynchronous analog convolution, exhibiting low power consumption and high accuracy across various CV applications by leveraging the non-volatility and programmability of the MDWMTJ. Moreover, our developed device-circuit-algorithm co-design framework captures device constraints (low tunnel-magnetoresistance, low dynamic range) and circuit constraints (non-linearity, process variation, area consideration) based on monte-carlo simulations and device parameters utilizing GF22nm FD-SOI technology. Our experimental results suggest we can achieve an average of 45.3% reduction in backend-processor energy, maintaining similar front-end energy compared to the state-of-the-art and high accuracy of 79.17% and 95.99% on the DVS-CIFAR10 and IBM DVS128-Gesture datasets, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 为资源有限的边缘设备提供计算机视觉 (CV) 能力的愿望必须克服收集和处理大量传感数据的高能耗问题。为了应对这一挑战，这项工作提出了一种用于神经形态视觉传感器的节能非冯诺依曼像素内处理解决方案，首次采用新兴的 (X) 磁畴壁磁隧道结 (MDWMTJ) 与基于 CMOS 的神经形态像素相结合。我们的混合 CMOS+X 方法执行原位大规模并行异步模拟卷积，通过利用 MDWMTJ 的非易失性和可编程性，在各种 CV 应用中表现出低功耗和高精度。此外，我们开发的器件-电路-算法协同设计框架基于蒙特卡罗模拟和利用 GF22nm FD-SOI 技术的器件参数，捕获器件约束（低隧道磁阻、低动态范围）和电路约束（非线性、工艺变化、面积考虑）。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，我们可以实现后端处理器能耗平均降低 45.3%，同时保持相似的前端能耗，并且在 DVS-CIFAR10 和 IBM DVS128-Gesture 数据集上分别达到 79.17% 和 95.99% 的高精度。

papers.title: Towards Cost-Effective Real-Time High-Throughput End Station Design for Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN).
papers.abstract: Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) technology has been increasingly deployed in mission- and safety-critical industrial applications to achieve high throughput and deterministic communications. To provide stringent timing guarantee, TSN requires that network devices follow a predefined communication schedule for real-time end-to-end packet processing, involving both TSN bridges and end stations. Extensive efforts have been devoted on the TSN bridge design in the literature. Achieving TSN compatibility on the end stations (especially on COTS hardware), however is challenging due to their constrained resources. To fill this gap, this work presents a software-based open-source TSN end station design that i) enables ultra-low latency and nanosecond-level transmission accuracy based on DPDK, and ii) employs a novel multi-core scheduling framework to boost the throughput of real-time TSN traffic. Our proposed solution leverages existing COTS hardware and thus is more generic and cost-effective compared to existing hardware-centric solutions. We validate our design by developing a prototype end station and incorporating it in a real-world TSN testbed. Our extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our design compared with other state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 时间敏感网络 (TSN) 技术已越来越多地部署在任务关键型和安全关键型工业应用中，以实现高吞吐量和确定性通信。为了提供严格的时序保证，TSN 要求网络设备遵循预定义的通信时间表来进行实时端到端数据包处理，涉及 TSN 网桥和终端站。文献中对 TSN 桥设计进行了大量的工作。然而，由于资源有限，在终端站（尤其是 COTS 硬件）上实现 TSN 兼容性具有挑战性。为了填补这一空白，这项工作提出了一种基于软件的开源 TSN 终端站设计，i）基于 DPDK 实现超低延迟和纳秒级传输精度，ii）采用新颖的多核调度框架来提高实时 TSN 流量的吞吐量。我们提出的解决方案利用现有的 COTS 硬件，因此与现有的以硬件为中心的解决方案相比更通用且更具成本效益。我们通过开发原型终端站并将其合并到现实世界的 TSN 测试台中来验证我们的设计。我们广泛的实验证明了我们的设计与其他最先进的解决方案相比的效率和有效性。

papers.title: Towards Efficient SRAM-PIM Architecture Design by Exploiting Unstructured Bit-Level Sparsity.
papers.abstract: Bit-level sparsity in neural network models harbors immense untapped potential. Eliminating redundant calculations of randomly distributed zero-bits significantly boosts computational efficiency. Yet, traditional digital SRAM-PIM architecture, limited by rigid crossbar architecture, struggles to effectively exploit this unstructured sparsity. To address this challenge, we propose Dyadic Block PIM (DB-PIM), a groundbreaking algorithm-architecture co-design framework. First, we propose an algorithm coupled with a distinctive sparsity pattern, termed a dyadic block (DB), that preserves the random distribution of non-zero bits to maintain accuracy while restricting the number of these bits in each weight to improve regularity. Architecturally, we develop a custom PIM macro that includes dyadic block multiplication units (DBMUs) and Canonical Signed Digit (CSD)-based adder trees, specifically tailored for Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) operations. An input pre-processing unit (IPU) further refines performance and efficiency by capitalizing on block-wise input sparsity. Results show that our proposed co-design framework achieves a remarkable speedup of up to 7.69× and energy savings of 83.43%.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经网络模型中的位级稀疏性蕴藏着巨大的未开发潜力。消除随机分布的零位的冗余计算可显着提高计算效率。然而，传统的数字 SRAM-PIM 架构受到严格的交叉架构的限制，很难有效地利用这种非结构化的稀疏性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 Dyadic Block PIM (DB-PIM)，这是一种突破性的算法架构协同设计框架。首先，我们提出了一种与独特的稀疏模式相结合的算法，称为二元块（DB），它保留非零位的随机分布以保持准确性，同时限制每个权重中这些位的数量以提高规律性。在架构上，我们开发了一个自定义 PIM 宏，其中包括二元块乘法单元 (DBMU) 和基于规范符号数字 (CSD) 的加法器树，专为乘法累加 (MAC) 运算而定制。输入预处理单元 (IPU) 通过利用块输入稀疏性进一步提高性能和效率。结果表明，我们提出的协同设计框架实现了高达 7.69 倍的显着加速和 83.43% 的节能。

papers.title: Towards High-Performance Virtual Platforms: A Parallelization Strategy for SystemC TLM-2.0 CPU Models.
papers.abstract: SystemC TLM-2.0 is currently the industry standard for simulating full Systems-on-a-Chip (SoCs). Although SystemC is designed to simulate the behavior of complex, parallel systems, the simulation itself is by default single-threaded. We present a technique to overcome this performance limitation by parallelizing the CPU model of a SystemC-TLM-2.0-based system-level simulator, a so-called Virtual Platform (VP). Our solution is fully compliant with the SystemC standard. To further increase the performance, we developed algorithms for asynchronous DMI pointer caching and we introduced a new tunable parameter called async_rate. This parameter controls the frequency used to annotate timing information to SystemC.
papers.abstract_zh: SystemC TLM-​​2.0 目前是模拟完整片上系统 (SoC) 的行业标准。尽管 SystemC 旨在模拟复杂并行系统的行为，但模拟本身默认是单线程的。我们提出了一种技术，通过并行化基于 SystemC-TLM-2.0 的系统级模拟器（即所谓的虚拟平台 (VP)）的 CPU 模型来克服这种性能限制。我们的解决方案完全符合 SystemC 标准。为了进一步提高性能，我们开发了异步 DMI 指针缓存算法，并引入了一个名为 async_rate 的新可调参数。该参数控制用于向 SystemC 注释定时信息的频率。

papers.title: Towards Redundancy-Free Recommendation Model Training via Reusable-aware Near-Memory Processing.
papers.abstract: The memory-intensive embedding layer in recommendation model continues to be the performance bottleneck. While prior works have attempted to improve the embedding layer performance by exploiting the data locality to cache the frequently accessed embedding vectors and their partial sums. However, these solutions rely on the static cache, which is inapplicable in the embedding training scenario where the embedding vectors are updated frequently. To this end, this paper proposes ReFree, a redundancy-free near-memory processing (NMP) solution for recommendation model training. Specifically, ReFree identifies the reusable data in realtime for both embedding layer forward and backward stages and leverages a lightweight NMP architecture to enable redundancy-free near-memory acceleration of the entire embedding training process. Evaluation results on real-world datasets show that ReFree outperforms the state-of-the-art solutions by 10.9× and reduces 5.3× energy consumption on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 推荐模型中的内存密集型嵌入层仍然是性能瓶颈。虽然之前的工作试图通过利用数据局部性来缓存频繁访问的嵌入向量及其部分和来提高嵌入层的性能。然而，这些解决方案依赖于静态缓存，这在嵌入向量频繁更新的嵌入训练场景中并不适用。为此，本文提出了ReFree，一种用于推荐模型训练的无冗余近内存处理（NMP）解决方案。具体来说，ReFree 实时识别嵌入层前向和后向阶段的可重用数据，并利用轻量级 NMP 架构来实现整个嵌入训练过程的无冗余近内存加速。对真实世界数据集的评估结果表明，ReFree 的性能比最先进的解决方案高出 10.9 倍，平均能耗降低 5.3 倍。

papers.title: TraceFormer: S-parameter Prediction Framework for PCB Traces based on Graph Transformer.
papers.abstract: Signal integrity becomes more critical to modern digital systems such as solid-state drives due to their high-speed operation. However, one of the challenges in signal integrity analysis is S-parameter modeling process for printed circuit boards (PCB). Due to increasing PCB design complexity, existing numerical methods take too long to solve governing equations for S-parameters. To overcome the issue, we present a novel deep learning framework, TraceFormer, to predict S-parameters of PCB traces. Our framework constructs a graph from PCB traces and tokenizes trace segments with geometric and topological information. A transformer encoder produces PCB representations from the tokens, followed by extraction networks which predict four different types of complex-valued S-parameters together. TraceFormer achieved above 0.99 R-squared score up to 15GHz for 4-port PCB designs, resulting in less than 3.1% and 4.2% errors in terms of the eye diagram's width and height, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于固态硬盘等现代数字系统的高速运行，信号完整性变得更加重要。然而，信号完整性分析的挑战之一是印刷电路板 (PCB) 的 S 参数建模过程。由于 PCB 设计复杂性不断增加，现有数值方法求解 S 参数控制方程所需的时间过长。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习框架 TraceFormer，用于预测 PCB 走线的 S 参数。我们的框架根据 PCB 迹线构建图表，并使用几何和拓扑信息标记迹线段。变压器编码器从标记生成 PCB 表示，然后是提取网络，一起预测四种不同类型的复值 S 参数。对于 4 端口 PCB 设计，TraceFormer 在高达 15GHz 的频率下实现了 0.99 以上的 R 平方分数，导致眼图宽度和高度误差分别低于 3.1% 和 4.2%。

papers.title: TrafficHD: Efficient Hyperdimensional Computing for Real-Time Network Traffic Analytics.
papers.abstract: With the evolution of network infrastructure, the pattern of network traffic becomes unprecedentedly complex. Conventional machine learning algorithms struggle to cope with the high-dimensional data and real-time processing speeds required in such complex networks. Fortunately, Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC), which is power-efficient and supports parallel processing, provides a potential solution to this challenge. In this paper, we present TrafficHD, a novel classification framework that leverages HDC to analyze network traffic in real-time. By transforming network traffic features into high-dimensional binary vectors, TrafficHD enables the rapid execution of recognition tasks within the constraints of real-time systems. Extensive evaluations on a wide range of network tasks show that TrafficHD is 30.57× and 98.32× faster than state-of-the-art (SOTA) machine learning and HDC algorithms while providing 3× higher robustness to network noise.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着网络基础设施的发展，网络流量的模式变得前所未有的复杂。传统的机器学习算法难以应对此类复杂网络所需的高维数据和实时处理速度。幸运的是，高能效且支持并行处理的超维计算（HDC）为这一挑战提供了潜在的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了 TrafficHD，这是一种利用 HDC 实时分析网络流量的新颖分类框架。通过将网络流量特征转换为高维二进制向量，TrafficHD 能够在实时系统的约束下快速执行识别任务。对各种网络任务的广泛评估表明，TrafficHD 比最先进的 (SOTA) 机器学习和 HDC 算法快 30.57 倍和 98.32 倍，同时对网络噪声的鲁棒性提高 3 倍。

papers.title: TraiNDSim: A Simulation Framework for Comprehensive Performance Evaluation of Neuromorphic Devices for On-Chip Training.
papers.abstract: The advancement of neuromorphic devices (NDs) for processing deep neural networks has narrowed the accuracy gap with software-trained models. To accurately assess ND performance, reliable simulation frameworks for on-chip training are crucial. However, existing frameworks encounter difficulties accurately reflecting the characteristics of NDs in training simulations. Consequently, we introduce TraiNDSim, a novel framework that comprehensively evaluates the performance of NDs to address these difficulties. Specifically, we propose an advanced conductance normalization strategy called layer-wise normalization, which limits the weight range by taking the initial weight distribution into account. Additionally, our framework integrates three conductance models, notably refining one of the conventional models to depend solely on nonlinearity. Moreover, it features a bi-directional weight representation method with a unique conductance compensation technique. Our comprehensive analysis using TraiNDSim demonstrates its effectiveness in accurately reflecting the impact of ND parameters on training, promising more precise device performance evaluations. Our framework is available at https://github.com/donghyeokheo/TraiNDSim.
papers.abstract_zh: 用于处理深度神经网络的神经形态设备（ND）的进步缩小了与软件训练模型的准确性差距。为了准确评估 ND 性能，用于片上训练的可靠仿真框架至关重要。然而，现有框架在训练模拟中难以准确反映 ND 的特征。因此，我们引入了 TraiNDSim，这是一种新颖的框架，可以全面评估 ND 的性能以解决这些困难。具体来说，我们提出了一种称为逐层归一化的高级电导归一化策略，它通过考虑初始权重分布来限制权重范围。此外，我们的框架集成了三个电导模型，特别是改进了传统模型之一，使其仅依赖于非线性。此外，它还具有具有独特电导补偿技术的双向权重表示方法。我们使用 TraiNDSim 进行的综合分析证明了其在准确反映 ND 参数对训练的影响方面的有效性，有望实现更精确的设备性能评估。我们的框架位于 https://github.com/donghyeokheo/TraiNDSim。

papers.title: Trapped by Your WORDs: (Ab)using Processor Exception for Generic Binary Instrumentation on Bare-metal Embedded Devices.
papers.abstract: Analyzing the security of closed-source drivers and libraries in embedded systems holds significant importance, given their fundamental role in the supply chain. Unlike x86, embedded platforms lack comprehensive binary manipulating tools, making it difficult for researchers and developers to effectively detect and patch security issues in such closed-source components. Existing works either depend on full-fledged operating system features or suffer from tedious corner cases, restricting their application to bare-metal firmware prevalent in embedded environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 鉴于嵌入式系统中的闭源驱动程序和库在供应链中的基本作用，分析它们的安全性具有重要意义。与 x86 不同，嵌入式平台缺乏全面的二进制操作工具，这使得研究人员和开发人员很难有效地检测和修补此类闭源组件中的安全问题。现有的工作要么依赖于成熟的操作系统功能，要么受到繁琐的极端情况的影响，将其应用限制在嵌入式环境中普遍存在的裸机固件上。

papers.title: Triplet Network-Based DNA Encoding for Enhanced Similarity Image Retrieval.
papers.abstract: With the exponential growth of digital data, DNA is emerging as an attractive medium for storage and computing. Thus, design methods for encoding, storing, and searching digital data within DNA storage are of utmost importance. This paper introduces image classification as a measurable task for evaluating the performance of DNA encoders in similar image searches. Furthermore, we propose a novel triplet network-based DNA encoder to improve the accuracy and efficiency. The evaluation using the CIFAR-100 dataset demonstrates that the proposed encoder outperforms existing encoders in retrieving similar images, with an accuracy of 0.77, which is equivalent to 94% of the practical upper limit, and 16 times faster training time.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着数字数据的指数级增长，DNA 正在成为一种有吸引力的存储和计算介质。因此，在 DNA 存储中编码、存储和搜索数字数据的设计方法至关重要。本文介绍了图像分类作为一项可测量的任务，用于评估 DNA 编码器在类似图像搜索中的性能。此外，我们提出了一种新型的基于三元组网络的 DNA 编码器，以提高准确性和效率。使用 CIFAR-100 数据集的评估表明，所提出的编码器在检索相似图像方面优于现有编码器，准确度为 0.77，相当于实际上限的 94%，并且训练时间快了 16 倍。

papers.title: TSAcc: An Efficient \underline{T}empo-\underline{S}patial Similarity Aware \underline{Acc}elerator for Attention Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Attention-based models provide significant accuracy improvement to Natural Language Processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV) fields at the cost of heavy computational and memory demands. Previous works seek to alleviate the performance bottleneck by removing useless relations for each position. However, their attempts only focus on intra-sentence optimization and overlook the opportunity in the temporal domain. In this paper, we accelerate attention by leveraging the tempo-spatial similarity across successive sentences, given the observation that successive sentences tend to bear high similarity. This is rational owing to many semantic similar words (namely tokens) in the attention-based models. We first propose an online-offline prediction algorithm to identify similar tokens/heads. We then design a recovery algorithm so that we can skip the computation on similar tokens/heads in succeeding sentences and recover their results by copying other tokens/heads features in preceding sentences to reserve accuracy. From the hardware aspect, we propose a specialized architecture TSAcc that includes a prediction engine and recovery engine to translate the computational saving in the algorithm to real speedup. Experiments show that TSAcc can achieve 8.5X, 2.7X, 14.1X, and 64.9X speedup compared to SpAtten, Sanger, 1080TI GPU, and Xeon CPU, with negligible accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于注意力的模型为自然语言处理（NLP）和计算机视觉（CV）领域提供了显着的准确性提高，但代价是大量的计算和内存需求。以前的工作试图通过删除每个位置的无用关系来缓解性能瓶颈。然而，他们的尝试只关注句子内的优化，而忽略了时域中的机会。在本文中，鉴于连续句子往往具有高度相似性的观察结果，我们通过利用连续句子之间的时空相似性来加速注意力。这是合理的，因为基于注意力的模型中存在许多语义相似的单词（即标记）。我们首先提出一种在线离线预测算法来识别相似的令牌/头。然后，我们设计一种恢复算法，以便我们可以跳过对后续句子中相似标记/头部的计算，并通过复制前面句子中的其他标记/头部特征来恢复其结果，以保留准确性。从硬件方面，我们提出了一种专门的架构 TSAcc，其中包括预测引擎和恢复引擎，以将算法中的计算节省转化为真正的加速。实验表明，与 SpAtten、Sanger、1080TI GPU 和 Xeon CPU 相比，TSAcc 可以实现 8.5 倍、2.7 倍、14.1 倍和 64.9 倍的加速，且精度损失可以忽略不计。

papers.title: Uncovering Software-Based Power Side-Channel Attacks on Apple M1/M2 Systems.
papers.abstract: Traditionally, power side-channel analysis requires physical access to the target device, as well as specialized devices to measure the power consumption with enough precision. Recently research has shown that on x86 platforms, on-chip power meter capabilities exposed to a software interface might be used for power side-channel attacks without physical access. In this paper, we show that such software-based power side-channel attack is also applicable on Apple silicon (e.g., M1/M2 platforms), exploiting the System Management Controller (SMC) and its power-related keys, which provides access to the on-chip power meters through a software interface to user space software. We observed data-dependent power consumption reporting from such SMC keys and analyzed the correlations between the power consumption and the processed data. Our work also demonstrated how an unprivileged user mode application successfully recovers bytes from an AES encryption key from a cryptographic service supported by a kernel mode driver in MacOS. We have also studied the feasibility of performing frequency throttling side-channel attack on Apple silicon. Furthermore, we discuss the impact of software-based power side-channels in the industry, possible countermeasures, and the overall implications of software interfaces for modern on-chip power management systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统上，电源侧通道分析需要对目标设备进行物理访问，以及专用设备来以足够的精度测量功耗。最近的研究表明，在 x86 平台上，暴露给软件接口的片上功率计功能可能会在没有物理访问的情况下用于功率旁路攻击。在本文中，我们表明这种基于软件的电源旁道攻击也适用于 Apple 芯片（例如 M1/M2 平台），利用系统管理控制器（SMC）及其与电源相关的密钥，通过用户空间软件的软件接口提供对片上功率计的访问。我们观察了来自此类 SMC 密钥的数据相关功耗报告，并分析了功耗与处理数据之间的相关性。我们的工作还演示了非特权用户模式应用程序如何成功地从 MacOS 中内核模式驱动程序支持的加密服务中的 AES 加密密钥中恢复字节。我们还研究了对苹果芯片进行频率限制旁道攻击的可行性。此外，我们还讨论了基于软件的电源侧通道对行业的影响、可能的对策以及软件接口对现代片上电源管理系统的总体影响。

papers.title: Unleashing the Potential of AQFP Logic Placement via Entanglement Entropy and Projection.
papers.abstract: Adiabatic quantum-flux-parametron (AQFP) logic, known for its energy efficiency, has emerged as a prominent superconductor-based logic family, surpassing traditional rapid single flux quantum (RSFQ) logic. In AQFP circuits, each cell operates on AC power, serving as both a power supply and clock signal to drive data flow across clock phases. However, signal attenuation with increasing wirelength may result in more potential data errors. To address this, rows of buffers are inserted as repeaters to ensure data synchronization and avoid wirelength violations. However, these inserted buffer rows in the AQFP placement significantly amplifies power consumption and circuit delay. To address these challenges, in this paper, we propose an innovative and analytical method for the placement of AQFP. The proposed method aims at minimizing the need for additional buffers. The framework incorporates two key features: (1) entanglement entropy for topology initialization and (2) projection for placement and buffering. These features offer advantages such as avoiding intensive computations, including fix-order Lagrangian optimization in large-scale scenarios, while significantly reducing the required number of buffer rows. The experimental results validate the efficiency of the proposed framework, demonstrating an average reduction of 81% in the required number of buffers and acceleration of 1.88x in the processing time compared with the state-of-the-art method.
papers.abstract_zh: 绝热量子通量参数（AQFP）逻辑以其能效而闻名，已成为一个突出的基于超导体的逻辑系列，超越了传统的快速单通量量子（RSFQ）逻辑。在 AQFP 电路中，每个单元均采用交流电源运行，既充当电源又充当时钟信号，以跨时钟相位驱动数据流。然而，随着线长的增加，信号衰减可能会导致更多潜在的数据错误。为了解决这个问题，插入了几行缓冲区作为中继器，以确保数据同步并避免线长违规。然而，这些在 AQFP 布局中插入的缓冲器行显着增加了功耗和电路延迟。为了应对这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种用于放置 AQFP 的创新分析方法。所提出的方法旨在最大限度地减少对额外缓冲区的需求。该框架包含两个关键功能：（1）用于拓扑初始化的纠缠熵和（2）用于放置和缓冲的投影。这些功能具有避免密集计算等优点，包括大规模场景中的固定顺序拉格朗日优化，同时显着减少所需的缓冲区行数。实验结果验证了所提出框架的效率，与最先进的方法相比，所需缓冲区数量平均减少了 81%，处理时间加速了 1.88 倍。

papers.title: Unleashing the Power of T1-cells in SFQ Arithmetic Circuits.
papers.abstract: Rapid single-flux quantum (RSFQ), a leading cryogenic superconductive electronics (SCE) technology, offers extremely low power dissipation and high speed. However, implementing RSFQ systems at VLSI complexity faces challenges, such as substantial area overhead from gate-level pipelining and path balancing, exacerbated by RSFQ's limited layout density. T1 flip-flop (T1-FF) is an RSFQ logic cell operating as a pulse counter. Using T1-FF the full adder function can be realized with only 40% of the area required by the conventional realization. This cell however imposes complex constraints on input signal timing, complicating its use. Multiphase clocking has been recently proposed to alleviate gate-level pipelining overhead. The fanin signals can be efficiently controlled using multiphase clocking. We present the novel two-stage SFQ technology mapping methodology supporting the T1-FF. Compatible parts of the SFQ network are first replaced by the efficient T1-FFs. Multiphase retiming is next applied to assign clock phases to each logic gate and insert DFFs to satisfy the input timing. Using our flow, the area of the SFQ networks is reduced, on average, by 6% with up to 25% reduction in optimizing the 128-bit adder.
papers.abstract_zh: 快速单通量量子 (RSFQ) 是一种领先的低温超导电子 (SCE) 技术，具有极低的功耗和高速度。然而，在 VLSI 复杂性下实施 RSFQ 系统面临着挑战，例如门级流水线和路径平衡带来的大量面积开销，而 RSFQ 有限的布局密度则加剧了这一挑战。 T1 触发器 (T1-FF) 是一个 RSFQ 逻辑单元，用作脉冲计数器。使用T1-FF，只需传统实现所需面积的40%即可实现全加器功能。然而，该单元对输入信号时序施加了复杂的限制，使其使用变得复杂。最近提出了多相时钟来减轻门级流水线开销。可以使用多相时钟有效地控制 fanin 信号。我们提出了支持 T1-FF 的新型两阶段 SFQ 技术映射方法。 SFQ 网络的兼容部分首先被高效的 T1-FF 取代。接下来应用多相重定时来为每个逻辑门分配时钟相位并插入 DFF 以满足输入时序。使用我们的流程，SFQ 网络的面积平均减少了 6%，在优化 128 位加法器时减少了高达 25%。

papers.title: UpDLRM: Accelerating Personalized Recommendation using Real-World PIM Architecture.
papers.abstract: Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) have gained popularity in recommendation systems due to their effectiveness in handling large-scale recommendation tasks. The embedding layers of DLRMs have become the performance bottleneck due to their intensive needs on memory capacity and memory bandwidth. In this paper, we propose UpDLRM, which utilizes real-world processing-in-memory (PIM) hardware, UPMEM DPU, to boost the memory bandwidth and reduce recommendation latency. The parallel nature of the DPU memory can provide high aggregated bandwidth for the large number of irregular memory accesses in embedding lookups, thus offering great potential to reduce the inference latency. To fully utilize the DPU memory bandwidth, we further studied the embedding table partitioning problem to achieve good workload-balance and efficient data caching. Evaluations using real-world datasets show that, UpDLRM achieves much lower inference time for DLRM compared to both CPU-only and CPU-GPU hybrid counterparts.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）由于其在处理大规模推荐任务方面的有效性而在推荐系统中广受欢迎。由于对内存容量和内存带宽的强烈需求，DLRM 的嵌入层已成为性能瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了 UpDLRM，它利用现实世界的内存处理 (PIM) 硬件 UPMEM DPU 来提高内存带宽并减少推荐延迟。 DPU 内存的并行特性可以为嵌入查找中的大量不规则内存访问提供高聚合带宽，从而为减少推理延迟提供了巨大的潜力。为了充分利用 DPU 内存带宽，我们进一步研究了嵌入表分区问题，以实现良好的工作负载平衡和高效的数据缓存。使用真实数据集的评估表明，与仅使用 CPU 和 CPU-GPU 混合的对应方案相比，UpDLRM 的 DLRM 推理时间要短得多。

papers.title: Using Probabilistic Model Rollouts to Boost the Sample Efficiency of Reinforcement Learning for Automated Analog Circuit Sizing.
papers.abstract: Despite recent advances in algorithms, such as the use of reinforcement learning, analog circuit sizing optimization remains a challenging task that demands numerous circuit simulations, hence extensive CPU times. This paper introduces the application of Model-Based Policy Optimization (MBPO) to highly boost the sample efficiency of reinforcement learning for analog circuit sizing. This method leverages an ensemble of probabilistic dynamic models to generate short rollouts branched from real data for a fast but extensive exploration of the design space, thereby speeding up the learning process of the reinforcement learning agent and improving its convergence. Integrated in the Twin Delayed DDPG (TD3) algorithm, our new model-based TD3 (MBTD3) approach is validated on analog circuits of different complexity, outperforming the existing model-free TD3 method by achieving power/area-optimal design solutions within up to ~3x fewer simulations and half the run time. In addition, for larger analog circuits, we present a multi-agent version of MBTD3, in which multiple simultaneous agents use global probabilistic models for sizing the different sub-blocks within the circuit. Demonstrated for a complex data receiver circuit, it surpasses the model-free multi-agent TD3 method with ~2x less simulations and half the run time. The proposed novel algorithms clearly boost the efficiency of automated analog circuit sizing.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管算法最近取得了进展，例如强化学习的使用，但模拟电路尺寸优化仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要大量的电路模拟，因此需要大量的 CPU 时间。本文介绍了基于模型的策略优化（MBPO）的应用，以极大地提高模拟电路尺寸调整的强化学习的样本效率。该方法利用概率动态模型的集合来生成从真实数据分支的短推出，以快速但广泛地探索设计空间，从而加快强化学习代理的学习过程并提高其收敛性。我们基于模型的新型 TD3 (MBTD3) 方法集成在双延迟 DDPG (TD3) 算法中，并在不同复杂度的模拟电路上进行了验证，通过在最多减少约 3 倍的仿真和一半的运行时间内实现功耗/面积优化设计解决方案，优于现有的无模型 TD3 方法。此外，对于较大的模拟电路，我们提出了 MBTD3 的多代理版本，其中多个同时代理使用全局概率模型来确定电路内不同子块的大小。它针对复杂的数据接收器电路进行了演示，超越了无模型多智能体 TD3 方法，仿真次数减少了约 2 倍，运行时间缩短了一半。所提出的新颖算法明显提高了自动模拟电路尺寸调整的效率。

papers.title: VAE-HDC: Efficient and Secure Hyper-dimensional Encoder Leveraging Variation Analog Entropy.
papers.abstract: Hyperdimensional computing (HDC) is a bio-inspired machine learning paradigm utilizing hyperdimensional spaces for data representation. HDC significantly improves the ability to learn from sparse data and enhances noise robustness, and also enables parallel computation. Despite these advantages, HDC's reliance on high dimensionality and operational simplicity can lead to increased hardware costs and potential security vulnerabilities. This paper introduces a novel HDC encoding strategy using variation-based analog entropy (VAE), aiming to reduce memory footprint, lower power/energy consumption, and enhance security with physically-unclonable entropy generation. The VAE cell, with high entropy robustness (30.23 -- 57.76 dB SNR) and a small footprint (10 transistors), allows HDC to achieve a 14.3× reduction in vector dimensions, a 4.4× decrease in unit entropy cell area, and a 2% increase in accuracy compared to binary/multi-bit HDC. These benefits lead to a 1.3 -- 4.4× area and a 327× leakage power reduction when compared to an SRAM baseline. We have designed custom low-power circuits that enable end-to-end analog entropy storage, distribution management, binding, permutation, and bundling. This analog implementation prevents data conversion during feature vector encoding, thereby significantly enhancing energy efficiency (48.5nJ per query). Furthermore, with hardware-secured basis vectors, data security is significantly improved, as evidenced by the markedly degraded visual distinguish-ability of retrieved image data and maximum of 11 dB lower PSNR.
papers.abstract_zh: 超维计算（HDC）是一种利用超维空间进行数据表示的仿生机器学习范例。 HDC显着提高了从稀疏数据中学习的能力并增强了噪声鲁棒性，并且还支持并行计算。尽管有这些优势，HDC 对高维和操作简单性的依赖可能会导致硬件成本增加和潜在的安全漏洞。本文介绍了一种使用基于变化的模拟熵 (VAE) 的新型 HDC 编码策略，旨在减少内存占用、降低功耗/能耗，并通过物理上不可克隆的熵生成来增强安全性。 VAE 单元具有高熵稳健性（30.23 - 57.76 dB SNR）和较小的占用空间（10 个晶体管），使得 HDC 与二进制/多位 HDC 相比，可以实现矢量维度减少 14.3 倍、单位熵单元面积减少 4.4 倍、精度提高 2%。与 SRAM 基准相比，这些优势可实现 1.3 至 4.4 倍的面积和 327 倍的泄漏功率降低。我们设计了定制的低功耗电路，可实现端到端模拟熵存储、分发管理、绑定、排列和捆绑。这种模拟实现可防止特征向量编码期间的数据转换，从而显着提高能源效率（每个查询 48.5nJ）。此外，利用硬件保护的基本向量，数据安全性显着提高，检索到的图像数据的视觉辨别能力显着下降，PSNR 最多降低 11 dB。

papers.title: VARADE: a Variational-based AutoRegressive model for Anomaly Detection on the Edge.
papers.abstract: Detecting complex anomalies on massive amounts of data is a crucial task in Industry 4.0, best addressed by deep learning. However, available solutions are computationally demanding, requiring cloud architectures prone to latency and bandwidth issues. This work presents VARADE, a novel solution implementing a light autoregressive framework based on variational inference, which is best suited for real-time execution on the edge. The proposed approach was validated on a robotic arm, part of a pilot production line, and compared with several state-of-the-art algorithms, obtaining the best trade-off between anomaly detection accuracy, power consumption and inference frequency on two different edge platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 检测大量数据中的复杂异常是工业 4.0 中的一项关键任务，最好通过深度学习来解决。然而，可用的解决方案对计算要求很高，需要容易出现延迟和带宽问题的云架构。这项工作提出了 VARADE，这是一种新颖的解决方案，实现了基于变分推理的轻型自回归框架，最适合边缘实时执行。所提出的方法在作为试验生产线一部分的机械臂上进行了验证，并与几种最先进的算法进行了比较，在两个不同的边缘平台上获得了异常检测精度、功耗和推理频率之间的最佳权衡。

papers.title: ViT-slice: End-to-end Vision Transformer Accelerator with Bit-slice Algorithm.
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers have demonstrated remarkable performance in various vision tasks. However, general-purpose processors, such as CPUs and GPUs, face challenges in efficiently handling the inference of Vision Transformers. To address the issue, prior works have focused on accelerating only attention due to its high computational cost in NLP Transformers. In contrast, Vision Transformers demonstrate a higher computational cost due to linear modules such as linear transformation, linear projection and Feed-Forward Network (FFN), compared to attention. In this paper, we present ViT-slice, an algorithm-architecture co-design that enhances end-to-end performance and energy efficiency by optimizing not only attention but also linear modules. At the algorithm level, we propose bit-slice compression that avoids storing the redundant most significant bits (MSBs). Additionally, we present bit-slice dot product with early skip to efficiently compute the dot product using bit-sliced data. To enable early skip during the dot product computation, we leverage a trainable threshold. On the hardware level, we introduce a specialized bit-slice dot product unit (BSDPU) to efficiently process the bit-slice dot product with early skip algorithm. Additionally, we present a bit-slice encoder and decoder for on-chip bit-slice compression. ViT-slice achieves 244×, 35.3×, 16.8×, 10.4×, 5.0× end-to-end speedup over Xeon CPU, EdgeGPU, TITAN Xp GPU, Sanger accelerator and ViTCoD accelerator, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: Vision Transformers 在各种视觉任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，通用处理器（例如 CPU 和 GPU）在有效处理 Vision Transformers 的推理方面面临着挑战。为了解决这个问题，由于 NLP Transformer 中的计算成本很高，之前的工作只专注于加速注意力。相比之下，与注意力相比，视觉变换器由于线性变换、线性投影和前馈网络（FFN）等线性模块而表现出更高的计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了 ViT-slice，这是一种算法架构协同设计，它不仅通过优化注意力模块，还通过优化线性模块来增强端到端性能和能源效率。在算法层面，我们提出位片压缩，以避免存储冗余的最高有效位（MSB）。此外，我们提出了具有早期跳过功能的位片点积，以使用位片数据有效地计算点积。为了在点积计算期间启用早期跳过，我们利用可训练的阈值。在硬件层面，我们引入了专门的位片点积单元（BSDPU），通过早期跳过算法有效地处理位片点积。此外，我们还提出了用于片上位片压缩的位片编码器和解码器。 ViT-slice 相对于 Xeon CPU、EdgeGPU、TITAN Xp GPU、Sanger 加速器和 ViTCoD 加速器分别实现了 244×、35.3×、16.8×、10.4×、5.0× 端到端加速。

papers.title: VITA: ViT Acceleration for Efficient 3D Human Mesh Recovery via Hardware-Algorithm Co-Design.
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a promising solution to enable efficient 3D Human Mesh Recovery (HMR) in augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) applications. Despite many advancements in algorithm design, it remains a challenge to efficiently accelerate ViT-based HMR due to high computational complexity, substantial memory footprint, and compromised data locality. In this paper, we propose VITA, a hardware and algorithm co-design framework for ViT-based HMR with improved performance and energy efficiency. Specifically, on the algorithm side, we propose an average pooling model to replace conventional multi-head attention, which is further optimized with improved data locality. On the hardware side, we propose an accelerator architecture that can efficiently support various dataflows and computations demanded by pooling, normalization, and convolution operations. We evaluate the proposed VITA, and the evaluation result shows that the proposed VITA design can achieve 5.05× and 69.12× speedups on average over the state-of-the-art GPUs and CPUs on HMR tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 已成为一种很有前景的解决方案，可在增强现实和虚拟现实 (AR/VR) 应用中实现高效的 3D 人体网格恢复 (HMR)。尽管算法设计取得了许多进步，但由于高计算复杂性、大量内存占用和数据局部性受损，有效加速基于 ViT 的 HMR 仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 VITA，一种基于 ViT 的 HMR 的硬件和算法协同设计框架，具有改进的性能和能源效率。具体来说，在算法方面，我们提出了一种平均池化模型来代替传统的多头注意力，并通过改进的数据局部性进一步优化。在硬件方面，我们提出了一种加速器架构，可以有效地支持池化、标准化和卷积操作所需的各种数据流和计算。我们评估了所提出的 VITA，评估结果表明，所提出的 VITA 设计在 HMR 任务上比最先进的 GPU 和 CPU 平均可以实现 5.05 倍和 69.12 倍的加速。

papers.title: Voronoi Diagram-based Multiple Power Plane Generation on Redistribution Layers in 3D ICs.
papers.abstract: In three-dimensional integrated circuits, the interconnection design among chiplets on redistribution layers (RDLs) is crucial for achieving high-performance computing systems. To optimize the inter-chip connections, most of the previous works focused on automatic signal net routing and pin assignment. The power/ground plane generation, is still a manual and time-consuming task, especially when generating the power planes of more than ten power supplies on a limited number of RDLs. This paper proposes a novel Voronoi diagram-based multiple power/ground plane generation methodology that simultaneously optimizes the power/ground planes of all power/ground nets by utilizing the white space of given RDLs, while considering the signal routing blockages, power integrity, and complex design rules. Experimental results show that the proposed approach can achieve not only optimal area utilization but also the best cross-layer power integrity in terms of the total number of redundant vias.
papers.abstract_zh: 在三维集成电路中，再分配层（RDL）上小芯片之间的互连设计对于实现高性能计算系统至关重要。为了优化芯片间连接，之前的大部分工作都集中在自动信号网络布线和引脚分配上。电源/接地层的生成仍然是一项手动且耗时的任务，尤其是在有限数量的 RDL 上生成十多个电源的电源层时。本文提出了一种新颖的基于 Voronoi 图的多电源/接地平面生成方法，该方法利用给定 RDL 的空白空间同时优化所有电源/接地网络的电源/接地平面，同时考虑信号布线阻塞、电源完整性和复杂的设计规则。实验结果表明，所提出的方法不仅可以实现最佳的面积利用率，而且可以在冗余通孔总数方面实现最佳的跨层电源完整性。

papers.title: VVIP: Versatile Vertical Indexing Processor for Edge Computing.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a versatile vertical indexing processor (VVIP) based on a single-instruction multiple-data architecture for edge computing. In VVIP, the vertical source and destination indexing instructions are customized for area-efficient computations. The proposed indexing method reorders data within a processing module by using more registers and data-steering logic in the calculations. In particular, VVIP supports multibit-serial multiplication and sparse data operations by leveraging register files as lookup tables or accumulators. The VVIP, verified on a vector processor, has an area overhead of less than 2.8%. It exhibits an average computation rate that is 10.1 times faster than the 1-bit-serial multiplication in linear algebra benchmarks, and 1.2 times average performance improvement in unstructured sparse point-wise convolution tasks when compared to conventional control sequences.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于单指令多数据架构的用于边缘计算的多功能垂直索引处理器（VVIP）。在 VVIP 中，垂直源和目标索引指令是为区域高效计算而定制的。所提出的索引方法通过在计算中使用更多寄存器和数据引导逻辑来对处理模块内的数据重新排序。特别是，VVIP 通过利用寄存器文件作为查找表或累加器来支持多位串行乘法和稀疏数据操作。 VVIP 经矢量处理器验证，面积开销低于 2.8%。与传统控制序列相比，它的平均计算速率比线性代数基准中的 1 位串行乘法快 10.1 倍，并且在非结构化稀疏逐点卷积任务中的平均性能提高了 1.2 倍。

papers.title: Whisper: Timing the Transient Execution to Leak Secrets and Break KASLR.
papers.abstract: The vulnerabilities of transient execution have been exploited in many side-channel attacks (SCA). We report Whisper, a novel transient execution timing (TET) side channel, which is based on the execution time difference of transient execution under different conditions. We develop TET version of SCAs including Meltdown, Zombieload, and Spectre-RSB that use Whisper as covert channel to leak information. We further propose TET-KASLR to break the kernel address space layout randomization (KASLR) mechanism under the protection of KPTI and FLARE. These attacks are simple to implement and can bypass the existing mitigation methods because the TET side channel relies on execution time that can be conveniently obtained by architectural level timing analysis. We demonstrate the correctness and effectiveness of these attacks on various x86-64 CPUs. The root cause of Whisper is analyzed with our toolset built on performance monitor unit (PMU) and potential defense against Whisper is also discussed.
papers.abstract_zh: 瞬态执行的漏洞已在许多旁路攻击（SCA）中被利用。我们报告了 Whisper，一种新颖的瞬态执行时序（TET）侧通道，它基于不同条件下瞬态执行的执行时间差异。我们开发了 SCA 的 TET 版本，包括 Meltdown、Zombieload 和 Spectre-RSB，它们使用 Whisper 作为秘密通道来泄露信息。我们进一步提出TET-KASLR来打破KPTI和FLARE保护下的内核地址空间布局随机化（KASLR）机制。这些攻击实施起来很简单，并且可以绕过现有的缓解方法，因为 TET 侧通道依赖于可以通过架构级时序分析方便地获得的执行时间。我们在各种 x86-64 CPU 上演示了这些攻击的正确性和有效性。我们使用基于性能监控单元 (PMU) 的工具集分析了 Whisper 的根本原因，并讨论了针对 Whisper 的潜在防御。

papers.title: WinoGen: A Highly Configurable Winograd Convolution IP Generator for Efficient CNN Acceleration on FPGA.
papers.abstract: The convolution neural network (CNN) has been widely adopted in computer vision tasks. In the FPGA-based CNN accelerator design, Winograd convolution can effectively improve computation performance and save hardware resources. However, building efficient and highly compatible IP for arbitrary Winograd convolution on FPGA remains underexplored. To address this issue, we propose a novel and efficient reformulation of Winograd convolution, named Structured Direct Winograd Convolution (SDW). We further develop WinoGen, a Chisel-based highly configurable Winograd convolution IP generator. Given arbitrary input/output tile size and kernel size, it can generate optimized high-performance IP automatically. Meanwhile, our generated IP can be compatible with multiple kernel sizes and tile sizes. Experimental results show that the IP generated by WinoGen achieves DSP efficiency up to 3.80 GOPS/DSP and energy efficiency up to 652.77 GOPS/W while showing 2.45× and 3.10× improvements when processing a same CNN model compared with state-of-the-arts.
papers.abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）已广泛应用于计算机视觉任务中。在基于FPGA的CNN加速器设计中，Winograd卷积可以有效提高计算性能并节省硬件资源。然而，在 FPGA 上为任意 Winograd 卷积构建高效且高度兼容的 IP 仍有待探索。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的 Winograd 卷积重新表述，称为结构化直接 Winograd 卷积（SDW）。我们进一步开发了 WinoGen，一个基于 Chisel 的高度可配置的 Winograd 卷积 IP 生成器。给定任意输入/输出瓦片大小和内核大小，它可以自动生成优化的高性能IP。同时，我们生成的IP可以兼容多种内核大小和切片大小。实验结果表明，WinoGen 生成的 IP 的 DSP 效率高达 3.80 GOPS/DSP，能效高达 652.77 GOPS/W，同时在处理相同的 CNN 模型时与最先进的技术相比，分别提高了 2.45 倍和 3.10 倍。

papers.title: ZeroTetris: A Spacial Feature Similarity-based Sparse MLP Engine for Neural Volume Rendering.
papers.abstract: Neural Volume Rendering (NVR), a novel paradigm for the longstanding problem of photo-realistic rendering of virtual worlds, has developed explosively in the past three years. The unique and substantial computational requirements of NVR pose challenge on deploying NVR to existing dedicated accelerator for neural networks. In this work, we propose ZeroTetris, a spacial feature similarity-based sparse multilayer perceptron (MLP) hardware accelerator for NVR. By leveraging the unique similarity-based sparsity between adjacent sampling points in NVR models, ZeroTetris efficiently bypass the computation of zero activations, thereby enhancing energy efficiency. Evaluation results affirm the effectiveness of the proposed design, showcasing ZeroTetris's superior performance in both area and power efficiency compared to other dedicated sparse matrix multiplication or MLP accelerator designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经体积渲染 (NVR) 是解决虚拟世界真实感渲染这一长期存在问题的一种新颖范例，在过去三年中得到了爆炸性的发展。 NVR 独特且大量的计算要求对将 NVR 部署到现有的神经网络专用加速器提出了挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ZeroTetr​​is，一种用于 NVR 的基于空间特征相似性的稀疏多层感知器 (MLP) 硬件加速器。通过利用 NVR 模型中相邻采样点之间独特的基于相似性的稀疏性，ZeroTetr​​is 有效地绕过了零激活的计算，从而提高了能源效率。评估结果证实了所提出设计的有效性，展示了与其他专用稀疏矩阵乘法或 MLP 加速器设计相比，ZeroTetr​​is 在面积和功率效率方面的卓越性能。

papers.title: Zeroth-Order Optimization of Optical Neural Networks with Linear Combination Natural Gradient and Calibrated Model.
papers.abstract: Optical neural networks (ONNs) have attracted great attention due to their low energy consumption and high-speed processing. The usual neural network training scheme leads to poor performance for ONNs because of their special parameterization and fabrication variations. This paper contributes to extend zeroth-order (ZO) optimization, which can be used to train such ONNs, in two ways. The first is to propose linear combination natural gradient, which mitigates the optimization difficulty caused by the special parameterization of an ONN. The second is to generate a guided direction vector by calibration for better guessing than random vectors generated in ZO optimization. Experimental results show that the two extensions significantly outperformed the existing ZO optimization and related methods with little computational overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 光神经网络（ONN）由于其低能耗和高速处理而引起了极大的关注。由于其特殊的参数化和制造变化，通常的神经网络训练方案导致 ONN 的性能较差。本文有助于扩展零阶（ZO）优化，它可以通过两种方式用于训练此类 ONN。首先是提出线性组合自然梯度，减轻了ONN特殊参数化带来的优化难度。第二个是通过校准生成引导方向向量，以便比 ZO 优化中生成的随机向量更好地猜测。实验结果表明，这两种扩展显着优于现有的 ZO 优化和相关方法，且计算开销很小。

papers.title: zeroTT: A Two-Step State Transition Avoidance Scheme for MLC STT-RAM.
papers.abstract: Compared with conventional SRAM, Spin-Transfer Torque Random Access Memory(STT-RAM) is expected to play a crucial role in future memory technologies with the increasing demands for higher storage density and lower power consumption for modern embedded systems. Moreover, Multi-Level Cell (MLC) STT-RAM outperforms Single-Level Cell (SLC) STT-RAM since it has higher bit density. However, MLC STT-RAM suffers from write performance due to the two-step state transitions (TTs) in memory cells' soft domain. State-of-the-art approaches mitigate this issue by reducing TTs with efficient data coding. Unfortunately, none of the existing works can fully eliminate the TTs. In this work, zeroTT, an optimal (3, 4)-based expansion coding method that eliminates TTs for MLC STT-RAM. The design of ZeroTT considers space overhead and coding complexity, and our experimental results demonstrate that zeroTT can completely avoid TTs, leading to a more efficient MLC STT-RAM memory in terms of access latency, energy consumption, and device lifetime.
papers.abstract_zh: 与传统的 SRAM 相比，随着现代嵌入式系统对更高存储密度和更低功耗的需求不断增加，自旋转移力矩随机存取存储器 (STT-RAM) 有望在未来的存储技术中发挥至关重要的作用。此外，多级单元 (MLC) STT-RAM 的性能优于单级单元 (SLC) STT-RAM，因为它具有更高的位密度。然而，由于存储单元软域中的两步状态转换 (TT)，MLC STT-RAM 的写入性能受到影响。最先进的方法通过有效的数据编码减少 TT 来缓解这个问题。不幸的是，现有的工作都不能完全消除 TT。在这项工作中，zeroTT 是一种基于 (3, 4) 的最佳扩展编码方法，可消除 MLC STT-RAM 的 TT。 ZeroTT 的设计考虑了空间开销和编码复杂性，我们的实验结果表明，zeroTT 可以完全避免 TT，从而在访问延迟、能耗和设备寿命方面实现更高效的 MLC STT-RAM 存储器。

papers.title: A bridge-based algorithm for simultaneous primal and dual defects compression on topologically quantum-error-corrected circuits.
A cost-efficient fully synthesizable stochastic time-to-digital converter design based on integral nonlinearity scrambling.
A cross-layer approach to cognitive computing: invited.
A defect tolerance framework for improving yield.
A distributed approach to silicon compilation: invited.
A fast and low-cost comparison-free sorting engine with unary computing: late breaking results.
A fast and scalable qubit-mapping method for noisy intermediate-scale quantum computers.
papers.abstract: This paper presents an efficient qubit-mapping method that redesigns a quantum circuit to overcome the limitations of qubit connectivity. We propose a recursive graph-isomorphism search to generate the scalable initial mapping. In the main mapping, we use an adaptive look-ahead window search to resolve the connectivity constraint within a short runtime. Compared with the state-of-the-art method [15], our proposed method reduced the number of additional gates by 23% on average and the runtime by 68% for the three largest benchmark circuits. Furthermore, our method improved circuit stability by reducing the circuit depth and thus can be a step forward towards fault tolerance.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种有效的量子位映射方法，该方法重新设计量子电路以克服量子位连接的限制。我们提出了一种递归图同构搜索来生成可扩展的初始映射。在主映射中，我们使用自适应前视窗口搜索来解决短时间内的连接约束。与最先进的方法[15]相比，我们提出的方法将三个最大基准电路的附加门数量平均减少了 23%，运行时间减少了 68%。此外，我们的方法通过减少电路深度提高了电路稳定性，因此可以向容错迈出一步。

papers.title: A fast parameter tuning framework via transfer learning and multi-objective bayesian optimization.
A joint management middleware to improve training performance of deep recommendation systems with SSDs.
A length adaptive algorithm-hardware co-design of transformer on FPGA through sparse attention and dynamic pipelining.
papers.abstract: Transformers are considered one of the most important deep learning models since 2018, in part because it establishes state-of-the-art (SOTA) records and could potentially replace existing Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Despite the remarkable triumphs, the prolonged turnaround time of Transformer models is a widely recognized roadblock. The variety of sequence lengths imposes additional computing overhead where inputs need to be zero-padded to the maximum sentence length in the batch to accommodate the parallel computing platforms. This paper targets the field-programmable gate array (FPGA) and proposes a coherent sequence length adaptive algorithm-hardware co-design for Transformer acceleration. Particularly, we develop a hardware-friendly sparse attention operator and a length-aware hardware resource scheduling algorithm. The proposed sparse attention operator brings the complexity of attention-based models down to linear complexity and alleviates the off-chip memory traffic. The proposed length-aware resource hardware scheduling algorithm dynamically allocates the hardware resources to fill up the pipeline slots and eliminates bubbles for NLP tasks. Experiments show that our design has very small accuracy loss and has 80.2 × and 2.6 × speedup compared to CPU and GPU implementation, and 4 × higher energy efficiency than state-of-the-art GPU accelerator optimized via CUBLAS GEMM.
papers.abstract_zh: Transformer 被认为是 2018 年以来最重要的深度学习模型之一，部分原因是它建立了最先进的 (SOTA) 记录，并且有可能取代现有的深度神经网络 (DNN)。尽管取得了显著成就，但 Transformer 模型的周转时间过长是一个广泛认可的障碍。序列长度的变化会带来额外的计算开销，其中输入需要用零填充到批次中的最大句子长度，以适应并行计算平台。本文针对现场可编程门阵列（FPGA），提出了一种用于 Transformer 加速的相干序列长度自适应算法-硬件协同设计。特别是，我们开发了一种硬件友好的稀疏注意算子和一种长度感知的硬件资源调度算法。所提出的稀疏注意力算子将基于注意力的模型的复杂性降低到线性复杂性，并减轻了片外内存流量。所提出的长度感知资源硬件调度算法动态分配硬件资源以填充管道槽并消除 NLP 任务的气泡。实验表明，我们的设计具有非常小的精度损失，并且与 CPU 和 GPU 实现相比具有 80.2 倍和 2.6 倍的加速，并且比通过 CUBLAS GEMM 优化的最先进的 GPU 加速器高 4 倍的能效。

papers.title: A near-storage framework for boosted data preprocessing of mass spectrum clustering.
A scalable SIMD RISC-V based processor with customized vector extensions for CRYSTALS-kyber.
A scalable symbolic simulation tool for low power embedded systems.
A time-to-first-spike coding and conversion aware training for energy-efficient deep spiking neural network processor design.
A timing engine inspired graph neural network model for pre-routing slack prediction.
papers.abstract: Fast and accurate pre-routing timing prediction is essential for timing-driven placement since repetitive routing and static timing analysis (STA) iterations are expensive and unacceptable. Prior work on timing prediction aims at estimating net delay and slew, lacking the ability to model global timing metrics. In this work, we present a timing engine inspired graph neural network (GNN) to predict arrival time and slack at timing endpoints. We further leverage edge delays as local auxiliary tasks to facilitate model training with increased model performance. Experimental results on real-world open-source designs demonstrate improved model accuracy and explainability when compared with vanilla deep GNN models.
papers.abstract_zh: 快速、准确的预布线时序预测对于时序驱动布局至关重要，因为重复布线和静态时序分析 (STA) 迭代成本高昂且不可接受。先前的时序预测工作旨在估计网络延迟和转换，缺乏对全局时序指标进行建模的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种受时序引擎启发的图神经网络（GNN）来预测时序端点的到达时间和松弛。我们进一步利用边缘延迟作为本地辅助任务，以促进模型训练并提高模型性能。现实世界开源设计的实验结果表明，与普通深度 GNN 模型相比，模型准确性和可解释性得到了提高。

papers.title: A2-ILT: GPU accelerated ILT with spatial attention mechanism.
ABNN2: secure two-party arbitrary-bitwidth quantized neural network predictions.
Accelerated synthesis of neural network-based barrier certificates using collaborative learning.
Accelerating and pruning CNNs for semantic segmentation on FPGA.
Accelerating nonlinear DC circuit simulation with reinforcement learning.
papers.abstract: DC analysis is the foundation for nonlinear electronic circuit simulation. Pseudo transient analysis (PTA) methods have gained great success among various continuation algorithms. However, PTA tends to be computationally intensive without careful tuning of parameters and proper stepping strategies. In this paper, we harness the latest advancing in machine learning to resolve these challenges simultaneously. Particularly, an active learning is leveraged to provide a fine initial solver environment, in which a TD3-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) is implemented to accelerate the simulation on the fly. The RL agent is strengthen with dual agents, priority sampling, and cooperative learning to enhance its robustness and convergence. The proposed algorithms are implemented in an out-of-the-box SPICElike simulator, which demonstrated a significant speedup: up to 3.1X for the initial stage and 234X for the RL stage.
papers.abstract_zh: 直流分析是非线性电子电路仿真的基础。伪瞬态分析（PTA）方法在各种连续算法中取得了巨大成功。然而，如果没有仔细调整参数和适当的步进策略，PTA 往往是计算密集型的。在本文中，我们利用机器学习的最新进展来同时解决这些挑战。特别是，利用主动学习来提供良好的初始求解器环境，其中实施基于 TD3 的强化学习 (RL) 来加速动态模拟。强化学习代理通过双代理、优先采样和合作学习来增强其鲁棒性和收敛性。所提出的算法在开箱即用的类似 SPICE 的模拟器中实现，显示出显着的加速：初始阶段高达 3.1 倍，RL 阶段高达 234 倍。

papers.title: Accelerator design with decoupled hardware customizations: benefits and challenges: invited.
Accurate BDD-based unitary operator manipulation for scalable and robust quantum circuit verification.
Accurate timing prediction at placement stage with look-ahead RC network.
Adaptive neural recovery for highly robust brain-like representation.
Adaptive window-based sensor attack detection for cyber-physical systems.
ADEPT: automatic differentiable DEsign of photonic tensor cores.
AL-PA: cross-device profiled side-channel attack using adversarial learning.
Algorithm/architecture co-design for energy-efficient acceleration of multi-task DNN.
papers.abstract: Real-world AI applications, such as augmented reality or autonomous driving, require processing multiple CV tasks simultaneously. However, the enormous data size and the memory footprint have been a crucial hurdle for deep neural networks to be applied in resource-constrained devices. To solve the problem, we propose an algorithm/architecture co-design. The proposed algorithmic scheme, named SqueeD, reduces per-task weight and activation size by 21.9x and 2.1x, respectively, by sharing those data between tasks. Moreover, we design architecture and dataflow to minimize DRAM access by fully utilizing benefits from SqueeD. As a result, the proposed architecture reduces the DRAM access increment and energy consumption increment per task by 2.2x and 1.3x, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 现实世界的人工智能应用，例如增强现实或自动驾驶，需要同时处理多个计算机视觉任务。然而，巨大的数据量和内存占用一直是深度神经网络在资源受限设备中应用的关键障碍。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了算法/架构协同设计。所提出的算法方案名为 SqueeD，通过在任务之间共享这些数据，将每个任务的权重和激活大小分别减少了 21.9 倍和 2.1 倍。此外，我们设计架构和数据流，充分利用 SqueeD 的优势，最大限度地减少 DRAM 访问。因此，所提出的架构将每个任务的 DRAM 访问增量和能耗增量分别减少了 2.2 倍和 1.3 倍。

EcoFusion: energy-aware adaptive sensor fusion for efficient autonomous vehicle perception.
papers.abstract: Autonomous vehicles use multiple sensors, large deep-learning models, and powerful hardware platforms to perceive the environment and navigate safely. In many contexts, some sensing modalities negatively impact perception while increasing energy consumption. We propose EcoFusion: an energy-aware sensor fusion approach that uses context to adapt the fusion method and reduce energy consumption without affecting perception performance. EcoFusion performs up to 9.5% better at object detection than existing fusion methods with approximately 60% less energy and 58% lower latency on the industry-standard Nvidia Drive PX2 hardware platform. We also propose several context-identification strategies, implement a joint optimization between energy and performance, and present scenario-specific results.
papers.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车使用多个传感器、大型深度学习模型和强大的硬件平台来感知环境并安全导航。在许多情况下，一些传感方式会对感知产生负面影响，同时增加能源消耗。我们提出了 EcoFusion：一种能量感知传感器融合方法，它使用上下文来适应融合方法并减少能耗，而不影响感知性能。在行业标准 Nvidia Drive PX2 硬件平台上，EcoFusion 在对象检测方面的性能比现有融合方法提高了 9.5%，能耗减少了约 60%，延迟降低了 58%。我们还提出了几种上下文识别策略，实现能量和性能之间的联合优化，并呈现特定场景的结果。

papers.title: Effective zero compression on ReRAM-based sparse DNN accelerators.
papers.abstract: For efficient DNN inference Resistive RAM (ReRAM) crossbars have emerged as a promising building block to compute matrix multiplication in an area- and power-efficient manner. To improve inference throughput sparse models can be deployed on the ReRAM-based DNN accelerator. While unstructured pruning maintains both high accuracy and high sparsity, it performs poorly on the crossbar architecture due to the irregular locations of pruned weights. Meanwhile, due to the non-ideality of ReRAM cells and the high cost of ADCs, matrix multiplication is usually performed at a fine granularity, called Operation Unit (OU), along both wordline and bitline dimensions. While fine-grained, OU- based row compression (ORC) has recently been proposed to increase weight compression ratio, significant performance potentials are still left on the table due to sub-optimal weight mappings. Thus, we propose a novel weight mapping scheme that effectively clusters zero weights via OU-level filter reordering, hence improving the effective weight compression ratio. We also introduce a weight recovery scheme to further improve accuracy or compression ratio, or both. Our evaluation with three popular DNNs demonstrates that the proposed scheme effectively eliminates redundant weights in the crossbar array and hence ineffectual computation to achieve 3.27--4.26× of array compression ratio with negligible accuracy loss over the baseline ReRAM-based DNN accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了实现高效的 DNN 推理，电阻 RAM (ReRAM) 交叉开关已成为一种很有前景的构建块，可以以节省面积和功耗的方式计算矩阵乘法。为了提高推理吞吐量，稀疏模型可以部署在基于 ReRAM 的 DNN 加速器上。虽然非结构化剪枝保持了高精度和高稀疏性，但由于剪枝权重的位置不规则，它在 crossbar 架构上表现不佳。同时，由于 ReRAM 单元的非理想性和 ADC 的高成本，矩阵乘法通常在字线和位线维度上以细粒度（称为操作单元（OU））执行。虽然最近提出了基于 OU 的细粒度行压缩 (ORC) 来提高权重压缩比，但由于次优权重映射，仍然存在显着的性能潜力。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的权重映射方案，通过OU级过滤器重新排序有效地聚类零权重，从而提高有效的权重压缩比。我们还引入了权重恢复方案，以进一步提高准确性或压缩比，或两者兼而有之。我们对三种流行的 DNN 的评估表明，所提出的方案有效地消除了交叉阵列中的冗余权重，从而消除了无效的计算，以实现 3.27--4.26× 的阵列压缩比，并且与基于 ReRAM 的基线 DNN 加速器相比，精度损失可以忽略不计。

Efficient access scheme for multi-bank based NTT architecture through conflict graph.
Efficient bayesian yield analysis and optimization with active learning.
Efficient ensembles of graph neural networks.
